programme.title: Wife Swap: Cyboran/ Owen-Ladino
programme.desc: A fun and flamboyant metropolitan couple who teach classes as relationship superheroes swap with a serious and strict mom and dad who moved to the country to protect their kids from the influences of the city.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Parker/ Robinson
programme.desc: One family puts all their energy into a son they claim is a hip hop star while ignoring their other four children. The other are more obsessed with tracking the 'swamp ape' then spending time with their only son.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Funderburgh/ Warren
programme.desc: A family who gave up a sophisticated city lifestyle for the simple life on an organic goat farm swap with a 'divalicious' mom who shops till she drops.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Cathrea/ Stewart
programme.desc: A family who believe the Mayan prophecy that the world will end in 2012 may be true swap with a family dedicated to ensuring a bright and successful future for their kids.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Flannagin/ Logan
programme.desc: An old fashioned family swaps lives with a modern high-tech family.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Beauvais/ Clayton
programme.desc: A family who believe the power of manifesting positive thinking with help anyone achieve their dreams swap with an unemployed family hit hard by the economy.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Schroeder/ Wardle
programme.desc: An artistic Goth family that encourages the kids to talk to the dead swaps with a family of hockey fanatics that doesn't hesitate to call kids losers when they play badly.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Adams/ Hess
programme.desc: An animal loving family who no fashion sense swaps places with an animal hating family with huge style.

programme.title: Wife Swap: Fulco/ Samel-Garloff
programme.desc: A hard-working family band obsessed with becoming rich and famous swaps lives with a free-thinking family of activists who believe in going against the mainstream.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Knowledge
programme.desc: A police investigation reveals details about a missing woman's past that no one suspected: She was a student by day and a $100-an-hour call-girl by night. Her many clients were all suspects in her disappearance, as was her boyfriend.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Line of Fire
programme.desc: Marty has to create an evacuation ark for livestock while Matt devises a layer of fire protection to save a homestead in danger of a wildfire.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys answer the call of a daughter whose mother and step-father's failing Arizona homestead is threatened by a deadly monsoon and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out
programme.desc: In Northern California, the Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of the Olson-Wilcox family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: What on Earth?: One Ocean
programme.desc: Six breath-taking images, six unfathomable mysteries; from a gigantic tsunami hundreds of feet high that never hits land, to a secret underground base in China and has an image from space finally revealed the location of the Garden of Eden?

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Kalahari
programme.desc: Satellites spot strange spiral markings in the remote African desert. A weird deadly black blob is threatening the Florida Keys. Something massive found deep beneath the ice of Antarctica.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Medusa
programme.desc: Experts investigate a strange glowing lake reported to turn things into stone. A mysterious structure in Africa that resembles Stonehenge is said to be the resting place of a mythical giant. A dark conspiracy could be at work in the Australian outback.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Dagger of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: A dagger sealed in the tomb of King Tut for more than 3,000 years is made of a metal that seems to have extraterrestrial origins. A massive swastika is found in the desert near Roswell. Satellites hunt for the world's most wanted man, Joseph Kony.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger
programme.desc: Mike helps dig tunnels that are used as underground wine caverns. Then Mike travels to the airport where he does the dirty jobs behind the scenes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner
programme.desc: Mike goes underground packing explosives into a wall of salt and blowing it up in order to break up the salt into small blocks. Mike masters the dirty job of salt mining and gets a new respect for the people who get dirty so the public can have salt.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cloning the Woolly Mammoth
programme.desc: To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh Gates visits the Korean biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a working Canadian gold mine. He then descends into a vast sinkhole in Siberia to unearth frozen DNA.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: Parker races to build a custom piece of mining equipment that will limit exposure to a deadly chemical used to extract gold. Then, Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Monster Mine
programme.desc: Parker navigates the volatile and lawless town surrounding Porgera, one of the world's largest and most profitable gold mines. Then, Dave's entire season comes down to 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hunt for Hidden Gold
programme.desc: Driven to find a lost gold mine, Parker joins forces with the grandson of a legendary gold miner in search of a hidden El Dorado lost since World War II.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker vs. Backhoe
programme.desc: Rugged terrain pushes Parker's heavy machinery skills to their limit, forcing him to attempt one dangerous maneuver after another in his quest to open a legendary lost gold mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: A Conversation With Parker and Dave: Risk and Reward
programme.desc: Parker and Dave reflect on the risks and rewards of mining. In Papua New Guinea, Parker's quest to find the motherlode of gold sent him deep into the jungle. He joined locals there in a sacrifice to appease the spirits.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Owned by the Roaches
programme.desc: Celia is a psychologist who helps other but can't solve her own hoarding problem. She is losing the battle against her stuff and the millions of roaches infesting her home.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Zombie Uprising
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors. Later, a doctor makes mistake that amazingly explains a patient's condition.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Hiccup Circus
programme.desc: A circus sword-swallower suffers from a persistent case of hiccups. A mother and daughter mysteriously collapse in the ER, for completely different reasons. A woman loses control of her legs at her daughter's graduation.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Where Are They Now: Cheri and Janice
programme.desc: Sisters Cheri and Janice discuss life without lumps as they bond over their love for Dr. Lee.

programme.desc: When a beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff battles to save his shattered leg. Then, Dr. Amy takes on a new challenge treating seven bad-tempered chickens, and a tiny kitten found unconscious at a construction site unites everyone in a fight to save it.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: The Great Escape
programme.desc: The Sumatran orangutans have been getting used to new quarters, when keepers see that Subis, Tuti, Siska and Indah have gone missing. The keepers must rely on their understanding of the escapees to try to tempt them back inside.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: You Are Free
programme.desc: Tania struggles to rescue a puppy that is hiding underneath a shed. A potential adopter comes to Villalobos hoping to find a companion for her dog, and she's only interested in seeing hounds. A beloved employee learns that he's finally off parole.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Wicked Bite
programme.desc: Jim Lane is picking blueberries alone in the Blue Ridge Mountains when a timber rattlesnake strikes. Teacher Rachael Lilienthal is swimming in a Florida river when an alligator bites down on her arm, pulls her underwater and doesn't let go.

programme.title: Movie: Boo! A Madea Halloween
programme.desc: Madea and her friends are asked to watch her great-niece on Halloween. As the night goes on they are plagued by supernatural events. Madea has to keep the teens out of trouble while fending off a number of paranormal threats like ghosts and zombies.

programme.title: Movie: Like Mike
programme.desc: A 14-year-old orphan loves basketball and idolizes Michael Jordan. After finding a pair of sneakers with the initials 'MJ' inside, he suddenly has the ability to make superhuman jump shots and dunks just like his hero. He dreams of a big NBA career.

programme.title: Movie: Roll Bounce
programme.desc: When the local skating rink goes out of business, X and his friends are forced to go to the Sweetwater Roller Rink. There, they find that they are not as talented as they thought and have difficulty keeping up with the trick skaters at the new rink.

programme.title: Martin: All the Players Came
programme.desc: Martin organizes a fundraiser to help save a failing theater in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Martin: Best and Bester
programme.desc: Tommy and Cole try to outdo each other in the hopes of being chosen as Martin's best man.

programme.title: Martin: High Noon
programme.desc: A convict named 'Mad Dog No Good' is getting out of jail and wants to meet Martin.

programme.title: Martin: Mother of the Bride
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's mother clash over whom to hire as a wedding planner.

programme.title: Martin: C.R.E.A.M.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina open a restaurant without any knowledge of how to run a business.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Did the Earth Move for You?
programme.desc: When an earthquake strikes, strange things happen to the relationships in Will's family.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Mother of All Battles
programme.desc: An all-out war ensues between Ashley's parents and those of a girl who is harassing her.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kimmie Has Two Moms
programme.desc: Kim and Nikki enter a talk show's best-mother contest, but after they win Nikki falls ill.

programme.title: The Parkers: I Never Rapped for My Father
programme.desc: Andell's cousin dates Oglevee without telling Nikki; T's dad wants into Freestyle Unity.

programme.title: The Parkers: Foul Ball
programme.desc: Stevie, Nikki and Kim enlist a ringer to win an annual softball game against a rival team.

programme.title: The Parkers: Cheaters Never Prosper
programme.desc: Professor Oglevee fires Nikki as his assistant when she tries to expose a cheating co-ed.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets a Job
programme.desc: Will gets a job so he can pay his own way.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: PSAT Pstory
programme.desc: When Will scores higher than Carlton on an intelligence test, Carlton resorts to cheating.

programme.title: Martin: Girlfriend
programme.desc: Gina's old friend, Monique, annoys everybody until Martin finds a way to expose Monique's insincerity.

programme.title: Martin: Romantic Weekend
programme.desc: Gina and Martin end up in the same island resort as Tommy and Pam. Each couple competes to have more fun.

programme.title: Martin: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Martin and Gina worry at their bachelor parties, and imagine what life will be like in five years.

programme.title: Martin: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Exasperated with their bickering friends and feuding relatives, Martin and Gina sneak away on the night before their wedding.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is a Beach
programme.desc: Martin and Gina escape the pandemonium at home and finally have the perfect wedding ceremony.

programme.title: The Parkers: Out With the Old, In With the New
programme.desc: Stevie meets her mother's boyfriend, who shows an interest in his girlfriend's daughter.

programme.title: The Parkers: School of Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A bitter rivalry erupts when a local DJ picks Kim as their new on-air hottie with a body.

programme.title: Black-ish: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow agreed they would no longer spank their kids, all bets might be off when Jack disobeys. Now, Zoey, Junior, Diane and a nervous Jack are afraid that their parents will go back on their word.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Prank King
programme.desc: Dre fears his holiday fun will be ruined when the older kids balk at the glorious Johnson Halloween tradition of seeing who can pull the most outlandish pranks on each other.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Oedipal Triangle
programme.desc: Dre's mother, Ruby, comes for a visit, and she smothers her pork chops with gravy, Dre with love, and would like to flat out smother Bow, who feels the same way about her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Santa/ White Christmas
programme.desc: Dre campaigns to be the new Santa at the annual office Christmas party, but when that honour goes to Angelica, the lovely head of HR, he goes to great lengths to unseat her because he’s convinced Stevens and Lido need a black Santa.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow find they always end up quarreling on their annual Valentine's Day date, this time around, Dre is determined to do everything right and keep the peace.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
programme.desc: When Zoey brings home her first 'serious' boyfriend, a boy from school also named Andre, Dre takes an instant dislike to him for many reasons that include the fact that he's white, from France and rather worldly for a kid.

programme.title: Movie: Ghost in the Shell
programme.desc: In the near future, a cyber-enhanced human named Major is devoted to stopping the world's most dangerous criminals. On the hunt for a new terrorist that can hack people, she discovers that her past is a lie, and she must solve the mystery of her life.

programme.title: Movie: After Earth
programme.desc: A young boy travels across the now abandoned planet Earth in search of a rescue beacon to save his father's life.

programme.title: Movie: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: Vampire death dealer Selene continues her struggle against the Lycans and Vampires that took everything from her. When she discovers the two factions are hunting her blood to become more powerful, she works to end the eternal war once and for all.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge
programme.desc: A family is held hostage for harbouring the target of a murderous syndicate during the Purge, a period in which any and all crime is legalized.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Counsellors are stalked and killed one by one by an unseen assailant at a newly re-opened summer camp that had been a murder site decades before.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part 3
programme.desc: Recovering from his injuries of the previous film, Jason takes refuge at a Crystal Lake cottage, only to find more teenagers have arrived for vacation.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Jason revives and returns to Camp Crystal Lake to murder its newest inhabitants, a carload of teenagers who've rented a house for the summer. A young boy with a penchant for monster make-up and effects may be the key to stopping Jason's current rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: Revived by an underwater electrical cable, Jason Voorhees lays waste to a cruise ship full of traveling teenagers on their way to New York to celebrate their high school graduation.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VII: The New Blood
programme.desc: A traumatized teenager with telekinetic abilities accidentally resurrects Jason while she vacations at Crystal Lake.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part VI: Jason Lives
programme.desc: Tommy Jarvis tries to destroy Jason's remains but accidentally resurrects him. Authorities in Crystal Lake, now renamed 'Forest Green' to distance themselves from Jason's past killing sprees, refuse to take Tommy seriously when Jason returns to town.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Five years after ending Jason Voorhees' killing spree, Tommy Jarvis now resides in a halfway house. When brutal murders start happening again, Tommy makes it his mission to find out if Jason has returned once more, and stop him if so.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: Jason revives and returns to Camp Crystal Lake to murder its newest inhabitants, a carload of teenagers who've rented a house for the summer. A young boy with a penchant for monster make-up and effects may be the key to stopping Jason's current rampage.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part 3
programme.desc: Recovering from his injuries of the previous film, Jason takes refuge at a Crystal Lake cottage, only to find more teenagers have arrived for vacation.

programme.title: Love It or List It: The Impossible Dream House
programme.desc: Steve and Theresa custom-built their dream home on a large, private lot, but the house doesn't work for them anymore. Steve wants to fix the kitchen and master bathroom, but Theresa would rather find a smaller house.

programme.title: Love It or List It: This Space Is Looking Up
programme.desc: A couple bought their home ten years ago, but once they became a family of four, they struggled with the size of the house. David searches for a turnkey house, while Hilary designs 'outside the box' to solve all their space challenges.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Fan Faves: Touchdown in Poland
programme.desc: A job opportunity is bringing a young football player and coach to the Polish seaside city of Gdynia. With help from his friend, this laid-back bachelor looks for a place that is centrally located but not too expensive.

programme.title: House Hunters: Fan Faves: Bachelor Pad in Chicago
programme.desc: A bachelor searches for an upgrade from his cramped Chicago apartment. His sister thinks he should buy something in a high-amenity downtown high-rise, but he'd prefer to stay in his comfort zone near Lincoln Park.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Fighting All the Way to the Bank
programme.desc: Contractor and real estate agent brothers should be the perfect flipping team, but their business has been a flop due to opposing priorities. They have no plans for their latest project, so Tarek steps in to guide the tempestuous duo over the finish line.

programme.title: Flipping 101 With Tarek El Moussa: Shared Driveways and Slim Margins
programme.desc: A couple wants to quit their day jobs in hopes of earning a massive return on a dilapidated Los Angeles Craftsman. A shared driveway and stress from a hard-money loan complicate the flip, and the couple calls on Tarek El Moussa to get it back on track.

programme.title: Crowded House Hunt: An Island Dream and Slice of Italy
programme.desc: The crowd accompanies a newly engaged couple looking for a kitchen with their dream island. Then, they follow a young family looking for a backyard with enough space for their son to run around.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Adjusting to the Netherlands
programme.desc: A Canadian bachelor wants to expand his chiropractic business in Utrecht, Netherlands. He hopes to find a home in the city center with plenty of outdoor and entertaining space, but with home prices skyrocketing, he may not get everything on his wish list.

programme.title: House Hunters: Hoping for a Unicorn in DC
programme.desc: Focuses on the emotional experience of finding and purchasing a new home.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a clean house in good shape that is aggressively priced in comparison to comparable properties in the area. But the reality of a dream listing doesn't always live up to the hype so they head over to check out the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Pig in a Poke
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a trust sale in Fullerton, California and make an offer on the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Lot Little Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a new listing in Buena Park, California that's small and run down but sits on a very large lot, offering possibilities for added value and increased profit.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: From Craftsman to Creole Cottage
programme.desc: A couple who loves New Orleans-style architecture asks Dave and Jenny transform their classic Craftsman into a Creole cottage. The duo work to remodel each room with unique touches like antique doors, gas lanterns and an airy front porch.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Bigger Kitchen for a Growing Family
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs overhaul an expecting couple's outdated, 1970s home into a space that feels welcoming for their growing family.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Classic Colonial Meets Modern-Day Makeover
programme.desc: Jenny and Dave are challenged to completely overhaul a historic Dutch Colonial home for a couple of farm owners and their two small children, while keeping the home's history and character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Outdated to Modern
programme.desc: A family that owns a local brewery purchased an older home rich with history, but the outdated rooms and obsolete features create many challenges. Dave and Jenny add creative and personal touches like a custom, handmade beer tap.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Surprise Renovation for First-Time Homeowner
programme.desc: A new homeowner's first place needs work, so her parents recruit Dave and Jenny to pull off a surprise renovation while she's out of town. The Marrs race the clock to create a quaint, warm and welcoming home that matches the homeowner's tastes perfectly.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Century-old Farmhouse Becomes New Forever Home
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny help a couple update their century-old farmhouse so that it better accommodates large family gatherings. Their main goal is to improve flow and add modern amenities without stripping the home of its unique country character.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A Drab Victorian Gets a Fab Facelift
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny Marrs help a woman turn her historic 1905 home into a beautiful Victorian retreat. But they have their work cut out for them with its shoddy, unfinished contracting work throughout the living room, kitchen, master bedroom and back porch.

programme.title: Home Town: Big Renovation in a Small Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier love their small town of Laurel, Mississippi. They're passionate about making their town flourish like it did years ago. The best way they know how is to make Laurel a friendly and welcoming place to live.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Banquette Dreams
programme.desc: Virginia newlyweds look for a new place to call home in Mississippi. They have an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a banquette, a master bedroom and a spacious front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: A Doctor in the House
programme.desc: Ben and Erin are eager to welcome a new pediatrician who hopes to settle down with his wife and work in the beautiful community. The couple wants a historical charmer with room to grow and a spacious outdoor area for entertaining.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Ex
programme.desc: A man reconnects with an ex girlfriend, but turns her down when she wishes to pursue something more than the kiss they share. He makes it clear that he loves his wife, spurring the ex girlfriend to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Matrimony
programme.desc: While avenging her sister's death, Portia runs into a man with her sister's heirloom necklace, and a pregnant woman with her own agenda. Things take a sudden turn when the couple is kidnapped and Portia is forced to negotiate their release.

programme.title: Movie: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
programme.desc: After tearfully pleaded to television cameras for the safe return of his missing pregnant wife, a man is found guilty of their murders.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: A deeper look into the circumstances surrounding the Chris Watts murder case.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Boyfriend
programme.desc: After struggling through a painful divorce, April finally decides to get back into the dating game and she meets Jacob. Jacob is hiding a very dark side, as he and his wife Karen have set April as their new mark.

programme.title: Movie: Stolen From the Suburbs
programme.desc: Katherine Hudson is living a safe suburban life in California with her teenage daughter, Emily. When Emily is drugged and abducted by human traffickers Katherine is forced to team up with a human trafficking survivor, to track Emily down and rescue her.

programme.title: Movie: You Killed My Mother
programme.desc: A teenager attacks a nurse after her mother is denied a life-saving organ transplant. Years later, she is released from a mental institution with revenge on her mind.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Intentions
programme.desc: A woman's estranged Aunt shows up on her doorstep shortly after her mom's funeral. As she uncovers her Aunt's true intentions and mysterious past, she discovers her Aunt isn't who she says she is and finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Movie: He's Watching
programme.desc: A woman about to be married is hired by her old college boyfriend for wealth management. Their business relationship turns into an affair which takes a downward spiral and becomes a disastrous mistake.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Girlfriend
programme.desc: When he moves away for a job, a man and his girlfriend try to keep make the long distance relationship work. But a new female coworker impersonates his girlfriend to show him that she isn't the girl for him after all.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Spirits Under Siege
programme.desc: Zak and the crew uncover dangerous paranormal activity at two abandoned locations in Civil War-scarred Vicksburg, Mississippi. First, a former Elks Lodge where an unsolved murder occurred. Then, a hospital with a history of disease and death.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hauntings of Vicksburg: Champion Hill Battlefield
programme.desc: Zak and the crew continue their Civil War investigation with the Battle of Champion Hill. Zak digs deep into the historic soil, which was the site of 6,000 casualties, and follows the trail of evil extending into the surrounding forest.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Lewis Flats School
programme.desc: Zak and the crew land in Deming, NM, to investigate a mysterious school situated on land that is soaked with the spirits of the Apache and their violent struggle to keep it from the pioneers during the 1800s.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Hotel Leger
programme.desc: The crew heads to Mokelumne Hill, CA, to investigate one of the state's oldest operating hotels. A devastating fire and the town's violent history has left a dark presence in the historic building that threatens the safety of employees and guests.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Union Brewery of Death
programme.desc: Zak and the crew are back in Virginia City, Nevada, to investigate the dark spirits haunting a historic brewery. A devastating fire and a short stint as a funeral home has stained the building, creating an energy unlike anything they've encountered.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Detox
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Elizabeth City, North Carolina, where a woman claims paranormal activity has spiked ever since she got sober. She fears if the evil spirits lurking inside her home can't be stopped, she will fall down a dark path of no return.

programme.title: The Dead Files: Collision Course: Oregon, Ohio
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Ohio to help a terrified couple save their business, son and marriage from violent paranormal activity. During her unsettling walk, Amy discovers two groups of warring dead people who torment each other and the living.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume One
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries and legends surrounding seven spine tingling sites.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Two
programme.desc: Dine with ghosts then party with the paranormal at a haunted nightclub. Head underground in Portland where unsuspecting folks were held captive and then hit up a haunted mansion and tattoo parlor.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Three
programme.desc: In this hour of Most Terrifying Places in America, we keep crisscrossing the country to tour even more paranormal hotspots. We visit a castle outside of Seattle that is haunted by a suicidal monk, and an early American Inn near Boston.

programme.title: Most Terrifying Places in America: Volume Four
programme.desc: In this instalment of the Most Terrifying Place in America, we visit the deepest, darkest, haunted spots our country has to offer. We explore a bar in Chicago that contains forces so dark it causes visitors to turn horribly violent.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: Eastern State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina travel to Philadelphia to gain unprecedented access to never-before-investigated areas of Eastern State Penitentiary. The team searches for the truth as they explore the sites where unimaginable suffering and death occurred.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: Twin City Opera House
programme.desc: It's a real-life case of the Phantom of the Opera as Jack and Katrina descend on the sleepy town of McConnelsville, Ohio, to investigate a majestic old theater long rumored to be haunted by a host of sordid spirits.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: Trans-Allegheny Lunatic Asylum
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina venture inside the imposing stone walls of a notoriously haunted hospital in Weston, West Virginia, that housed thousands of mentally ill patients over a dark 130-year-old history.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: LaLaurie Mansion
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina head down to the Big Easy to perform the first-ever paranormal investigation of the infamously haunted LaLaurie Mansion.

programme.title: Portals to Hell: Bobby Mackey's Music World
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina are in serious danger as they investigate a Kentucky honky-tonk considered by many to be the most haunted place on Earth and the location of an actual portal to Hell.

programme.title: Project Runway: Olympic Game Plan
programme.desc: Designers are paired up with a real athlete who will be competing to be in the 2020 Summer Olympic and Paralympic games. They create their dream outfit for a victory night celebration, ensuring the perfect proportions for their unique bodies.

programme.title: Project Runway: The Height of Avant-garde Fashion
programme.desc: With only one challenge left to make it to New York Fashion Week, the remaining designers must create an avant-garde look that is anything but ordinary. In a fashion first, the runway begins with a season long retrospective, outside and 16 stories high.

programme.title: Project Runway: Finale, Part 1
programme.desc: Christian visits the remaining contestants at home as they furiously complete their final collections. Then it's back to the work room to refine and revise. Even though New York Fashion is here, that doesn't mean everyone will show in the finale.

programme.title: Project Runway: Finale, Part 2
programme.desc: The remaining designers put final touches on their collections. Serena Williams joins as guest judge for the final runway, with only one designer chosen as the winner.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live
programme.desc: Guests include Nina Garcia and Diane Von Furstenberg.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysterious Places

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Angkor Wat, Cambodia, is the world's largest ancient religious temple. Within its megalithic ruins, researchers have discovered a depiction of a species of dinosaur: a stegosaurus.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Mysteries of the Sphinx
programme.desc: The Great Sphinx in Giza is the largest and most studied monolithic sculpture on Earth, yet it remains one of humanities greatest mysteries. This ancient monolith defies explanation and pre-dates our earliest known civilizations.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Today, we discuss ancient myths across a wide variety of cultures in which the gods are portrayed as intervening in human affairs. It is possible that these supernatural events may not be the work of gods, but rather proof of extraterrestrials.

programme.desc: When German aerospace engineer Wernher von Braun joined the U. S. military and space programs after World War II, he quickly became one of the foremost scientists.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Voices of the Gods

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Star Gods of Sirius

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Mountain
programme.desc: A mysterious mountain in northern Italy has stood witness to strange sightings in the sky and unexplainable phenomena for hundreds of years.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Brain

programme.desc: When a sinkhole suddenly forms beneath a Florida resort, engineers race to use cutting-edge technology to fix the devastating damage and prevent more deadly sinkholes from striking.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Geaux Speed Racers
programme.desc: The deputies are called in to bust teens illegally street racing in the bayou. Deputy Marlin Meeks is dispatched to a disturbance at an old house that is rumoured to be haunted.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Swamp Manhunt
programme.desc: An armed and dangerous fugitive from another parish tries to make his escape in the swamps.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators
programme.desc: When a vicious alligator attacks a dog, Deputy Melissa 'Catfish' Quintal calls in her alligator hunter boyfriend, Jacob Lirette, known as the 'Gator Man', to handle it. Also, deputies are sent in the dead of night to the eeriest bayous they've ever seen.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Conspiracy
programme.desc: With inmate drug use at an all-time high, the Squad searches for the source of the drugs that have made their way into the prison.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Extortion
programme.desc: The Squad believes that prison gang members are running an extortion game when an inmate's family receives violent threats.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Angie/ Paul
programme.desc: A single mother steals designer shoes and tries to return them for money resulting in a highspeed chase on the San Diego freeway. Next, an intoxicated young man rolls through a stop sign as police watch and a wild chase ensues.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Coal Miner's Slaughter
programme.desc: A respected businesswoman in the placid town of Madisonville, KY is found bludgeoned and stabbed to death in her home.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Dorothy Did Right

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Into the Woods
programme.desc: When Kathey Horn disappears, some believe she's following the Grateful Dead. Others think she was sacrificed during a Wicca initiation. Her mom wonders if she's run off with an older boyfriend. The man with the van knows what happened to Kathey.

programme.title: My Murder Story: Last Wife Standing
programme.desc: A woman falls head over heels and marries a charming man, but she gets more than she bargained for. Confronted with the harsh reality, she undertakes her own investigation to find out who she really married.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Unholy Communion
programme.desc: A devoted fiancé makes a devastating discovery: his beloved partner Anne Boncella and her 8-year-old daughter have been brutally murdered. The ensuing investigation will unravel shocking secrets that have lain dormant in their seemingly peaceful hometown.

programme.title: Man With a Van: Into the Woods

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: House of Shards
programme.desc: A childish joke between neighbouring kids turns into an all-out war when the adults get involved. For some, the laughter will end forever.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Predator
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Sacrifice Their Blood
programme.desc: These deadly women will do whatever it takes to have their own needs met, even if it means destroying their family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Get Rich Quick
programme.desc: These women think their men are worth more dead than alive. A scorned Southern belle tries to cash in on her ex's life; a countess clings to her riches through violent means; and a mother of two trades her husband for another shot at the good life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Gambling Lives Away
programme.desc: These women love to gamble; but when the money's all gone, the stakes turn deadly. A transgender woman is willing to kill for a new body; a mother and daughter trade a family member for a payout; and a wife tries to bury her debts along with her husband.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Two to Kill
programme.desc: Some women like company when they take a life. Teenage lovers chose each other over the life of a loving grandmother; a cold-hearted aunt uses her nephew to become a wealthy widow; and a friendship turns fatal for one unsuspecting husband.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A talented graduate student is nursing a broken heart, when she's swept off her feet by someone new. But as their relationship progresses, revelations make it clear nothing is quite what it appears to be.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Murder in the Mellen Patch
programme.desc: A body is found engulfed in flames in a Los Angeles alley. He's thought to be the victim of brutal gang violence, but a tip soon leads police to the victim's ex. When new evidence is unearthed years later, it's clear the police were dead wrong.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall: Young Mom Missing
programme.desc: A young mother from Austin, Texas suddenly drops out of contact. Police believe she may be taking a break somewhere, possibly with a new man. But Julie's family fears the worst.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Family Values
programme.desc: A woman who still lives in her family home befriends her new neighbours, only to be plunged into a nightmare of threats, violence and betrayal. When her brother steps up to protect her, blood will be spilled and lives forever shattered.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Rural Madness
programme.desc: Differences over how to enjoy life in a peaceful, rural neighborhood quickly escalate into a feud that comes to a bloody end on the road where it began.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Making America
programme.desc: We all know of George Washington, the California Gold Rush, the vast highways that stretch across America, and the wars between the United States and Great Britain. Learn about the secrets behind the making of America.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Al Capone
programme.desc: Al Capone is America's best known gangster and perhaps the single greatest symbol of the collapse of law and order in the United States during the Prohibition era of the 1920s. The FBI branded the bootlegging kingpin America's 'Public Enemy #1.'

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Outdoor Living Room
programme.desc: Miguel and Stephanie's overgrown yard is a mess, with its dilapidated pergola and a cracking concrete patio. Chris transforms the space into an outdoor living room complete with overlapping pergolas, a custom fire pit and a new grill.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Living Under the Sea
programme.desc: Pool designer Lucas Congdon must create an outdoor water room in which a mermaid could live. Former clients in love with all things ocean ask Lucas to remodel the tiny pool in their new home that sits just yards away from the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rockin' it in Rocket City
programme.desc: Lucas goes to Huntsville, Alabama to build the lifelong dream pool of a retiring military couple. Lucas designs the largest grotto enclosed spa and widest waterfall of his career. This build also requires a tornado shelter.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Green With Envy
programme.desc: Lucas and the crew have their work cut out for them as a client's demands leave him reluctant. A Caribbean destination that includes green rocks and a sand bottom salt-water pool is the client's request.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Growing Pains
programme.desc: A couple hires Lucas to take their outdated pool and remodel so it's safe for their baby boy. The hope is that the dull patio pool will be transformed into a stunning natural atrium.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Steak Out
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is in carnivore mode for the San Angelo Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Life Changers
programme.desc: We're revealing all the unforgettable dishes that changed our lives.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Kids' Menu
programme.desc: From macaroni and cheese to milkshakes to pizza, these are the greatest dishes found on- and inspired b- the kids' menu. Alex Guarnaschelli shares her comfort food lunch favourite from Ted's Bulletin in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Key Ingredient
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the surprise ingredient that goes into the best cinnamon roll ever, Alex Guarnaschelli loves sourdough bread made with pickle juice, and Monti Carlo heads to New Orleans for the most unique, irresistible oysters ever.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New Deli Done Right

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: A small-town baker is surprised with an invite to compete in a baking show. While there, she runs into her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: Movie: A Novel Romance
programme.desc: A best-selling novelist writing under a pen name moves to Portland and unknowingly falls in love with the biggest critic of his latest book. When true identities are revealed, both must take a leap of faith.

programme.title: Movie: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: A career-driven woman finds her life turned upside down when she is forced to return to her hometown to care for her sick mother.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Proposal
programme.desc: Old flames burn bright when a group of people meet up again for a ski weekend.

programme.title: Movie: Pumpkin Pie Wars
programme.desc: Two ladies have led a small-town family feud for years with the pumpkin bake-off at the annual harvest festival. This year, the buck is being passed to Casey and Sam, their kids. However, they fall head over heels in love with each other.

programme.title: Movie: Love on a Limb
programme.desc: A woman takes it up herself to try and save a beloved oak tree after the mayor hires a handsome landscaper to cut it down. She chains herself to it and as the landscaper attempts to wait her out, the tree brings them more than they could have imagined.

programme.title: Movie: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: After a few innocent April Fool's jokes, a woman's dream life starts to become reality.

programme.title: Movie: Stop the Wedding
programme.desc: A young single attorney finds out her mother is marrying a TV star and tries to stop it.

programme.title: Movie: Amazing Winter Romance
programme.desc: A journalist heads to her home town to find some inspiration for new stories. There, she discovers her childhood friend has built a giant snow maze, which leads to her to her one true love.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: The Story of Us
programme.desc: The owner of a Romance bookstore runs into her first love, an architect who is overseeing a development that will forever change her neighbourhood. Her nostalgia for her home clashes with his desire for change, but their romantic tension may unite them.

programme.title: Movie: Royally Ever After
programme.desc: Following a proposal, a man reveals he is the prince of a small country called St. Ives, and he needs his disapproving parents' blessing in order to marry.

programme.title: Movie: My Favorite Wedding
programme.desc: The maid of honour is stood up by her boyfriend and befriends the groom's best man. She then has to decide to go back to her old life or pursue a new one.

programme.title: South Park: Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Cartman convinces the boys to toilet paper their teacher's house. But when Kyle is overwhelmed with guilt for the horrendous prank, Cartman tries to kill him.

programme.title: South Park: Insecurity
programme.desc: Cartman signs up for a home security system.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever
programme.desc: Wendy gets into trouble when she threatens to beat up Cartman after school is out.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway Bro Down
programme.desc: After Randy takes Sharon to see a hit musical, he becomes Broadway's biggest fan.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Sarcastaball
programme.desc: The people of South Park Elementary address the crisis in football concussions.

programme.title: South Park: Margaritaville
programme.desc: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy. Stan and Kyle find another solution and save the townspeople's finances.

programme.title: Daniel Tosh: People Pleaser
programme.desc: No one is safe from Daniel Tosh in his biting fourth special, People Pleaser. He takes on everyone from couples who can't conceive and parents of sick children to hoarders, marathoners and even his fans.

programme.title: This Week at the Comedy Cellar: Orgasm Cup
programme.desc: Each week, seasoned comedians and rising stars alike swing by the Comedy Cellar in New York City to reflect on the latest in pop culture, current events and more.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Cherokee Hair Tampons
programme.desc: Kyle is on his deathbed with a rare kidney disease. Cartman is found to be the perfect donor, but withholds his kidney until Kyle can pay him 10 million dollars.

programme.title: South Park: Cat Orgy
programme.desc: While all the adults are gathering at Mr. Mackey's house to watch a meteor shower Shelly Marsh is left baby-sit Cartman. They square off when she invites her much older boyfriend over.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.title: South Park: Jewbilee
programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: South Park: Spontaneous Combustion
programme.desc: When the citizens of South Park start exploding randomly, the mayor enlists Stan's dad, the resident geologist, and the town's only scientists, to find a solution to the problem.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School
programme.desc: Trent Boyett, the kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge. Fearful for their lives, Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny hire sixth graders and Stan's sister as bodyguards.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.
