programme.title: Movie: My Evil Stepdad
programme.desc: Concerned about her mother being lonely when she leaves for college, a girl creates an online dating profile for her in secret and meets someone she thinks is perfect for her. However, when they finally meet, the man doesn't seem so perfect after all.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Monitor Murders
programme.desc: A babysitter returns from her senior year at college and accepts a job. While working, she uncovers what she thinks is a murder plot over the baby-monitor.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Gold Rush: A Conversation With Parker and Dave: One Step Forward, Two Sluices Back
programme.desc: Parker and Dave talk about the various setbacks they have faced in their mining careers. Equipment failure and bad weather can derail an operation. Dave Turin and his crew had to troubleshoot when thick clay in the pay dirt clogged their sluice.

programme.title: Gold Rush: A Conversation With Parker and Dave: Team Effort
programme.desc: Parker and Dave talk about their experiences overseeing a crew while running a mining operation. Mining is a team effort, and success depends on everyone working together. Dave's crew is assured its efforts are worthwhile after a look into the gold room.

programme.title: Gold Rush: A Conversation With Parker and Dave: Hit or Miss
programme.desc: Veteran miners Parker and Dave discuss the hit-or-miss nature of mining. Some miners take risks on new ground in hopes of striking gold. The risks can pay off, as Parker learned when he closed in on a record gold total.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hunt for New Ground
programme.desc: Parker seeks a gold-rich claim in Australia he can mine year-round. Aussie miner Tyler Mahoney leads Parker to the richest ground and largest nuggets he's ever seen. At Birdseye Mine in Montana, Freddy Dodge gives Team Turin a major new lead.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Race Against Time
programme.desc: The Rookies battle busted hoses and finally hit treasure. Boulder Boys Aaron and Greg bring in an old monster about to self-destruct, and at their wash plant, The Cooke Brothers race to beat the worst drought in a decade.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hunt for New Ground
programme.desc: Parker seeks a gold-rich claim in Australia he can mine year-round. Aussie miner Tyler Mahoney leads Parker to the richest ground and largest nuggets he's ever seen. At Birdseye Mine in Montana, Freddy Dodge gives Team Turin a major new lead.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Race Against Time
programme.desc: The Rookies battle busted hoses and finally hit treasure. Boulder Boys Aaron and Greg bring in an old monster about to self-destruct, and at their wash plant, The Cooke Brothers race to beat the worst drought in a decade.

programme.title: River Of No Return: Rapid Response
programme.desc: When a rafter goes overboard, a legendary jetboat captain springs into action to save the man before the river's rapids claim another victim. Heavy rains threaten to destroy Aubrey's ranch. She calls in air support to help save her barn.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Game of Bones and Unknowns
programme.desc: Josh explores the beauty of the spiritual realm. He investigates a German basilica said to house the bones of 11,000 virgins, a Japanese ice cave guarded by a dragon's spirit and a remote island where cats outnumber humans.

programme.title: The Scott Martin Challenge: Hilary Martin on Lake Okeechobee
programme.desc: Hilary Martin goes fishing for bass on Lake Okeechobee with Scott.

programme.title: The Experience: Craig Morgan Country Music Artist Austin Sine - Hero
programme.desc: Craig Morgan joins to surprise USCG hero and family man Austin Sines.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Secrets in Stone
programme.desc: Josh explores three legendary locations where stone labyrinths hide something incredible, including a vast city carved deep into a canyon in the Jordanian desert and a dark South Pacific cave once used as a kitchen by a cannibal tribe.

programme.title: Addictive Fishing: Bits and Bites
programme.desc: Blair shows us some extra footage from the season.

programme.title: The Next Bite: Trolling Bass Crankbaits and Swimbaits for Walleye
programme.desc: Gary Parsons of Bass Pro Ships/Cabela's joins John Hoyer and Bill Shimota to showcase cutting edge techniques trolling bass crank and swim baits in dirtier water.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: The Hatching
programme.desc: Collecting eggs from a coop can be an adrenaline rush for even hardcore outdoors people.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Electric Offshore
programme.desc: Justin learns new techniques and learns to appreciate electric reels and a fast boat.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cheese Maker
programme.desc: Mike works as a keeper at the San Francisco Zoo, and as a Vermont cheese maker.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cedar Log Peeler
programme.desc: Mike lends a hand with debarking, peeling, and processing wood for a cedar log cabin.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tofu Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads out to California to spend a day at an electronic waste recycling plant, and then he jets off to Honolulu to learn how to make tofu.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Rendering
programme.desc: Mike heads to Southern California to find out what it takes to keep a tar pit clean. Then Mike travels north where he learns about rendering and discovers how much of a farm animal can be recycled.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bone Black
programme.desc: Mike heads to Michigan where he gets dirty in the Bone Black plant. He then meets with twin sisters who are huge fans of the show.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Control Specialist
programme.desc: Mike heads to California to work as an Animal Control Specialist by removing skunks and other rodents from under people's houses.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Marble Maker

programme.desc: Ross and Monica's grandmother dies; Ross falls into an open grave and hurts his back.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Dozen Lasagnas
programme.desc: Monica is stuck with a dozen lasagnas; Paolo hits on Phoebe when he gets a massage.

programme.desc: When Chandler sees Rachel half-naked, she tries to get even by catching him in the shower.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Two Parts

programme.desc: SpongeBob has a change in demeanor after Squidward closes the gap in his teeth.

programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Fish Bowl/ Married to Money

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fandom Pains/ Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: The Loud House: Selfie Improvement/ No Place Like Homeschool
programme.desc: When Carol Pingrey's photo gets more likes on social media than Lori's she tries to one-up her. Lola is being temporarily homeschooled. Thinking it looks like fun, the other kids try to get in on it.

programme.title: Weather Underground

programme.desc: When Khloe's ex-husband Lamar releases a memoir that includes details about their relationship, she considers reconnecting with him for the first time in years. After an old rumour resurfaces, Kris worries that it will spark a fight between her and Khloe.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: A pair of bumbling cops are sent back to high school where they attempt to blend in to take down a drug ring.

programme.title: Movie: Friday
programme.desc: Two friends must come up with $200, to pay drug dealer Big Worm for marijuana they smoked.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Classics
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's driving the Camaro all over the nation for some real deal eats.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kid Rock's Detroit Tour
programme.desc: Guy's taking Kid Rock's lead on a tour through D-town!

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Intercontinental Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy hits up world flavours tucked away in the U.S.A. In Los Angeles, a Korean-Mexican mashup serves up short rib tacos and spicy pork chimichangas. Also, a New Orleans-inspired joint cooks up Big Easy po' boys and crawfish mac and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: California Cruisin'
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is on the west coast for a taste of California. In Culver City, Gene Simmons makes a surprise appearance to the neighborhood hangout serving up Hawaiian dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meat Lover's Paradise
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's signing up for a meat-crazed master class. In Portland, Ore., the craft-cooking family joint with a chef who butchers, cures, preserves and smokes everything in-house.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Roadtrippin
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headed coast to coast, from north to south. In Somers Point, N.J., he meets up with Rachael vs. Guy Kids Cookoff contestant Gibson Borelli at the local legend dishin' out righteous crab-stuffed flounder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Near to Far
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a trip around the world without leaving the U.S. An Italian eatery in Boston is still serving up real-deal dishes from the homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Near to Far
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a trip around the world without leaving the U.S. An Italian eatery in Boston is still serving up real-deal dishes from the homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bagels, Biscuit and Boar
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is diggin' into all kinds of flavour, starting in Santa Fe, N.M., at a pub serving comfort grub like chicken and biscuits and in-the-shell clam chowder. Also, a spot in Reno, NV, is on its game with a double elk chop and wild boar spaetzle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Finger Lickin' Food
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri is eating up grub that doesn't require a knife and fork! In Atlanta, a funky old house turned brew pub cookin' up cheddarwurst corn dogs along with a knockout pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crazy Chicken and Twisted Burgers
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's digging into crazy twists on chicken and burgers! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a bourbon bar that's piling pork onto a patty and doctoring up chicken skins.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Italian, Hawaiian and Colombian
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into a multicultural flavour fest. In Hawaii, a poke place is knocking it out of the park with their island specialties. In San Carlos, California, a crazy Italian spot putting tasty twists on their homemade pasta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Finger-Licking Good
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli joins Michael Symon at one of his favorite Manhattan spots, where they combine a bottomless beer selection with the most high-octane hot dog known to man.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, where a place he went as a kid combines several classic sweets to make a one-of-a-kind dessert burger.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Fresh New Flavors
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson's Bruschetta Burger and Katie Lee's Barbecue Salmon Cobb Salad. Creating fresh, seasonal dishes is easy with a Field Guide to Greens and new ways to use leftover lemons.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Chicken
programme.desc: Ina shares her kitchen tips and professional strategies for roasted chicken with radishes, from trussing the bird to carving it. Then, a delicious twist on a classic with chicken and spinach Waldorf salad. Plus, truffled chicken liver mousse.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Go Green or Go Home
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a St. Patrick's Day party, offering her spin on traditional Irish dishes. Guests will feast on hearty Lamb and Red Wine Stew, Mashed Yukon Gold Potatoes with Savoy Cabbage, plus a Smoked Salmon 'Crudo' with creamy cucumbers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Harlem Globetrotters
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her friend, Glenda, welcome a trio of Harlem Globetrotters -- Hoops, Bull and Moose -- for lunch in exchange for some famous Globetrotter trick lessons.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Don't Get Curried Away
programme.desc: The best thing about Rachael's chicken curry in a hurry with basmati is the homemade curry mix. She seizes the opportunity to experiment with curry flavor by making her own spice blend instead of using a store-bought one.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Birthday for Two
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her husband, Ladd, are celebrating their birthdays with a dinner for two. While he's out on the ranch, she makes skillet spaghetti and meatballs with her favourite cheesy pesto garlic bread pinwheel.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faster Pasta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making pasta dishes in no time at all. She whips up steakhouse pasta with grilled steak, and her lemon pasta pronto is scattered with glorious flecks of pink and green.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Supermarket Swaps
programme.desc: Inspired by the show 'Supermarket Stakeout,' the hosts are swapping grocery bags and making exciting new dishes. Katie Lee starts with spicy pecan-crusted chicken thighs with Sunny's groceries. Sunny uses Geoffrey's groceries to make bread pudding.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Sharpen Up!
programme.desc: Home cooks want to sharpen up their knife skills, and get some advice from Trisha.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Love For Loveless Cafe
programme.desc: One of Trisha Yearwood's favorite spots in Nashville is The Loveless Cafe. She spends the day putting a spin on her favorite dishes from the restaurant.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Spring's Natural Wonders
programme.desc: Eleven bakers celebrate the natural beauty of spring by making perfectly patterned spring fruit geometric tarts. Then they show off their skills by making trendy fault line cakes.

programme.title: Chopped: Sweets: Million Dollar Desserts
programme.desc: Scott Conant welcomes four chefs who are excited to create extraordinary desserts using pricey, premium ingredients. An unusual caviar is one of the standouts in the first basket, and round two has the competitors working with something golden.

programme.title: Chopped: Espresso Express
programme.desc: The chefs must make coffee click with the basket ingredients. In round two the chefs are surprised by sweetbreads and a brightly-colored sugary snack must be balanced with black molasses in the dessert round.

programme.title: Vegas Chef Prizefight: Courage in the Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Anne Burrell pushes the seven remaining chefs to the limit with a challenge to create a dish using the nopal cactus. Then, the candidates have to create Mexican dishes worthy of dinner service at Guy Fieri's El Burro Borracho.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Mini Murry
programme.desc: After Barry pleads for money to purchase a very expensive item, Beverly says he must earn the money himself, so Murray suggests he go to work at the Ottoman Empire furniture store with him. Meanwhile, Adam and Pops attend an R-rated movie.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Why're You Hitting Yourself?
programme.desc: While fighting over the remote control, Adam reaches a defining moment in his relationship with Barry when they accidentally discover a "channel between the channels" that appears on TV. Meanwhile, Beverly grows tired of seeing so many women with Pops.

programme.title: Roseanne: Halloween IV
programme.desc: After refusing to take part in the spooky festivities, Roseanne is visited by the ghosts of Halloween Past, Present, and Future.

programme.title: Roseanne: Ladies' Choice
programme.desc: Roseanne begins to feel her age when her mom moves into a retirement home. Meanwhile, Nancy drops a bombshell on Roseanne and Jackie by confessing to her relationship with another woman.

programme.title: Roseanne: Stand on Your Man
programme.desc: Arnie attempts to win back Nancy. Roseanne feels she must tell him Nancy is gay. When a stranger threatens Roseanne at The Lunch Box, Jackie insists that she, Roseanne and Nancy enroll in a self-defense class.

programme.title: Roseanne: Good Girls, Bad Girls
programme.desc: Darlene attends a rock concert with Molly, but is left to find her own way home when Molly meets a boy. Dan and Roseanne are worried sick when Darlene returns home hours late with an excuse they don't believe.

programme.title: Roseanne: Of Ice and Men
programme.desc: Dan takes to the ice to help D.J. win a position on the Junior Hockey League team, but D.J.'s position is generally on the floor. Meanwhile, Roseanne's patience is put to the test helping Jackie recover from a broken romance.

programme.title: Roseanne: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Dan is summoned to D.J.'s principal's office when he is caught with obscene reading materials - which he got from Darlene! Meanwhile, Roseanne learns a shocking secret when she presses Jackie about spending time with Fisher.

programme.title: Roseanne: War and Peace
programme.desc: Dan's in jail for beating up Jackie's boyfriend, Fisher, and Darlene relishes the moment when she has to bail him out. Meanwhile, Roseanne convinces Jackie to leave her abusive boyfriend.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lanford Daze
programme.desc: D.J.preps for a school play, Dan tries his hand at selling hot tubs, and Darlene demonstrates her animal rights stance by lashing out against Roseanne's business.

programme.title: Roseanne: Wait 'Til Your Father Gets Home
programme.desc: After their father dies, Roseanne and Jackie cope with their loss in very different ways.

programme.title: Roseanne: First Cousin, Twice Removed
programme.desc: Roseanne's rich and snooty cousin, Ronnie, makes an unannounced visit to Lanford. She reignites a long-simmering feud with Roseanne when she advises Darlene to leave home to pursue her dreams.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lose a Job, Winnebago
programme.desc: In her neighbors' motor home, Roseanne spearheads a trip to Hollywood where they all attend a taping of The Jackie Thomas Show. Meanwhile, Dan is determined to convince Roseanne to have another child.

programme.title: Roseanne: It's a Boy!
programme.desc: Darlene wants her boyfriend, David, to move in with the Conners. Roseanne is against the idea until she sees what David's home life is like. Now she has to convince Dan to let him stay.

programme.title: Roseanne: It Was Twenty Years Ago Today
programme.desc: Roseanne plans to set off some sparks by surprising Dan with a sexy boudoir photograph to mark their 20th wedding anniversary. But Dan's surprise gift to Roseanne results in major marital fireworks.

programme.title: Roseanne: Playing With Matches
programme.desc: Roseanne's mom makes a new friend, Jake, at the retirement home. Now, Roseanne's playing Cupid and Jackie's planning their wedding. With special guest Red Buttons.

programme.title: Roseanne: Promises, Promises
programme.desc: Darlene and David's youthful romance takes a complicated turn when she surprises him by renting a hotel room after their senior prom. Meanwhile, Roseanne and Dan decide to invest in a friend's business scheme.

programme.title: Roseanne: Glengarry, Glen Rosey
programme.desc: The old house Roseanne and Dan fixed up to sell languishes on the market after Roger abruptly skips town.

programme.title: Roseanne: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: Darlene must choose between David and her future when she gets accepted to a college for the arts in Chicago. Roseanne gets a visit from the new health inspector: her old boss Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Daughters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Dan and Roseanne decide to let Darlene go to art school in Chicago, but will Darlene leave David to pursue her future? Meanwhile, at a birthday party, 'Seven Minutes in Heaven' turns DJ into a new man.

programme.title: Roseanne: Two Down, One to Go
programme.desc: Darlene is going away to college in Chicago and, as a result, Roseanne is faced with saying goodbye to another daughter. In the hope of keeping Darlene from moving, David makes a last minute attempt and proposes marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Mommy's Curse
programme.desc: Jackie agrees to date Dan's co-worker, Fred, if Roseanne agrees to fire Bev from working at the diner. The plan backfires when Bev plans to sell her share of the diner to Leon.

programme.title: Roseanne: Party Politics
programme.desc: Roseanne suspects that Darlene and DJ are teaming up against her. Fred attempts to win Jackie back.

programme.title: Roseanne: A Stash From the Past
programme.desc: The discovery of a mysterious cache of marijuana in the Conner household sparks a smoky chain of events -- leading Roseanne and Dan to the humorous realization that their days of 'rebellious youth' are over.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Surviving for my Son

programme.title: I Was Prey: Mountain Mayhem
programme.desc: Professional climber Greg Boswell is high up an ice-covered Canadian mountain in the middle of the night when he is charged by a grizzly bear. Also, in upstate New York, a retired nurse is attacked by a rabid coyote.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Unseen Assailant
programme.desc: Paul is leading a canoe safari near Victoria Falls when a hippo bursts to the surface and drags him into the water. In Texas, five-year-old Jade DeMoss is outside, looking for her mother, when an animal pounces on her and attacks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Under Attack: Caught Between Bears
programme.desc: A marathon runner encounters a bear and her cub during a race, while a man on the job is struck by a mountain lion. Later, a triathlete is attacked by a bull shark, and a couple is grazed by a giraffe during their African getaway.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear. Days before their destination-wedding celebration, Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Safari Horror
programme.desc: Bob Legasa and his friend are hunting in Montana. What he thinks is a bluff charge from a grizzly bear is, in fact, a near-lethal attack. While canoeing in Zimbabwe, Kristen Yaldor is thrown into the water and finds herself in the jaws of a hippopotamus.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Alone in the Wild

programme.desc: A triathlete is attacked by a bull shark while training in Alabama. After being bit by a rattlesnake, a father fights to survive. A couple is attacked by a giraffe on vacation in Zambia. And a girls' trip turns deadly in Cancun.

programme.title: Tanked!: Channeling the Long Island Medium
programme.desc: World famous Long Island Medium's Theresa Caputo has asked Wayde and Brett to build her not one but two aquariums in a single week! The first is a mermaid tank in the heart of their living room and the other a koi pond in her backyard.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Winds of Trade
programme.desc: Renowned sea life painter Guy Harvey asks the crew to build their largest tank to date for the Trade Winds Resort in St. Pete Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Purr-fect Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett build a 1500 gallon aquarium into the ceiling of a hotel restaurant in Florida. Then, in Seattle they build a tank for internet sensation Henri the Cat.

programme.title: Tanked!: Demarcus Cousins and a Snake Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett have two clients who want aquariums in their own backyard! Basketball superstar Demarcus Cousins wants a corner tank for his Las Vegas house. Meanwhile, a Las Vegas pet store wants a tank for both fish and reptiles!

programme.title: Tanked!: Shark Byte
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett have a huge job on their hands, like 5000 gallons huge. Computer component manufacturer Samtec wants ATM to build them an aquarium unlike any other, a 20 foot long shark tank with exact replicas of their computer components inside.

programme.title: Tanked!: Brett's Donut Mania Tank
programme.desc: Donut Mania is Brett's newest business venture and they are about to have their grand opening. Wayde and the whole team want to congratulate him with a surprise fish tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wilmer's Tank-errama
programme.desc: Actor and producer Wilmer Valderrama asks the guys to build a tank with multiple angles and sides. Then, a health centre in Grand Rapids, Michigan wants a tank to mimic the city's famous rapids.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Under Construction
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan has the biggest idea of all. Tracy wants to be able to swim with his massive 6 ft sharks, so he wants the guys to tank his entire pool house. Meanwhile, a local car dealership needs a new tank in their showroom to make a big splash.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Revealed
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan is still waiting for his shark tank. The pressure is on Wayde and Brett to convert his entire poolhouse into a massive 14,000 gallon aquarium. Winter is approaching and extra care is taken while transporting Tracy's beloved sharks.

programme.title: Wild Australia: Jurassic Jungle

programme.title: Wild Australia: Koala Forest
programme.desc: There is more to the lush woodland of Australia than meets the eye. Strange birds build elaborate nests and strange mammals take to the air, but it’s the not-so-cuddly koala who steals the show.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Catastrophic Collapse
programme.desc: Over 1,000 people die when an eight-story factory suddenly collapses in one the deadliest engineering disasters in modern history. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal what went wrong, and how to prevent the next catastrophe.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Nightmare in Hell Valley
programme.desc: After torrential rainfall triggers a catastrophic landslide, a small village in the valley below is devastated, and now, new discoveries reveal the truth behind the engineering that led to this fatal disaster.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Desert Ghost Fort
programme.desc: A secret Russian military base in the Gobi Desert, a strange complex in an American wasteland, and a relic high atop a mountain are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secret of Supervillain Island
programme.desc: On a strange island off the coast of Croatia, the mysterious ruins of a long-abandoned hideout look like they once belonged to a James Bond supervillain, and new discoveries reveal why it was built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Betty/ Josh
programme.desc: Police chase a woman suffering from mental illness across state lines.

programme.title: Why I Ran: Justin/ Frank

programme.desc: Civil Rights Attorney Benjamin Crump recruits a team of experts, friends and relatives to investigate the murder of Tupac Shakur.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Crips vs. Bloods
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team investigate the theory that a known gang member, Orlando Anderson, is responsible for the murder of Tupac Shakur. The team looks into never before seen footage of Orlando, and examines his motive.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: East Coast vs. West Coast
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team investigate the theory that the East Coast vs West Coast rap rivalry led to Tupac’s murder. A key witness provides startling information.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Devil in a Red Suit
programme.desc: The investigative team dives into the chaotic relationship between Tupac Shakur and his label head, Marion (Suge) Knight. They explore whether Tupac's departure from Death Row was motive enough for Suge to turn on their friendship.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Death Row Takeover
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts examine the rumored Death Row coup that may have led to Tupac's murder.

programme.desc: Built on farmland, 'The Rock' was infamous as the site of stabbings and a decapitation.

programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: The Birth of a Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie Denny Cooper's father-in-law questions his decision to join the police when his wife is about to give birth and Dennis is off restraining a husband after a hit-and-run. Rookie Hugh Herndon begins on the wild streets of Tampa.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Riding Solo
programme.desc: Henry Conravey has successfully completed 12 weeks of field training but after a series of mistakes is not sure he'll be allowed to patrol the streets on his own. Chris Cade is looking forward to getting is own patrol car.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: Command Presence
programme.desc: Amy has issues with German Shepherds and being attacked by a K-9 is part of training.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Rookie Love
programme.desc: Rebecca is ten weeks in to her field training and makes a potentially fatal mistake. She and her boyfriend - also a rookie - must learn to deal with the realities that come with the dangerous job.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Dead Ringer/ My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Neighbours always mix up sisters Sarah and Stevie, but their polar-opposite personalities is what set them apart in the end. Elena and Christina were both adopted, but these teenage sisters love, laugh, and battle like blood relatives.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Final Sale
programme.desc: 50-year-old Beverly Carter is an internet savvy real-estate agent, but when she goes to meet a prospective buyer at a remote house, she goes missing. The search for Beverly goes viral, but depends on unravelling a web of false identities and fake clues.

programme.title: Web of Lies: High on Love
programme.desc: High school student Brandon Wentzell falls for blonde beauty Clarissa Chistiakov online. But the course of virtual love doesn't run smooth as the past collides with a toxic present, shattering lives.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: No Harmony in Polyamory
programme.desc: An open-minded foursome soon discovers there's no harmony in polyamory, and someone will pay the ultimate price for free love.

programme.desc: When typical teenage rebellion turns into deadly rage, a parent's love may not be enough to save their life.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mothers Who Kill
programme.desc: These stories will shock you and make you wonder what would drive a woman to murder her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Sugar and Spite
programme.desc: A father has his daughter's life all planned out - with secrets hiding at home & high hopes for the future, it will end in terror. Later, when sinister forces are at work, even a father's love to his daughter has its limits.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Lethal Misconduct
programme.desc: A shy Marine wife's loneliness lands her in the centre of a deadly love triangle; a taboo romance blooms, but it leads to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Seven Minutes of Terror
programme.desc: After Michael Brinkman is murdered in his home, police are left to untangle the mystery of why the two masked home invaders stole nothing and left a series of strange clues at the crime scene.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a young woman in the tree line of a popular camp site in the Rocky Mountains marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Terrifying Calls
programme.desc: A young girl disappears on her way home from school and the only clue police have is a series of terrifying calls her family had received in the days before she went missing.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Stolen Life
programme.desc: John Walsh explores the case of youthful con man Edgardo Perez, who allegedly preyed on older men until it turned deadly. Then, Callahan Walsh travels to Boulder to talk to a child predator.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: The Criminal Caregiver
programme.desc: After a vulnerable elderly man is brutalized in his rural home, John joins a thrilling manhunt for Derek Whisenand. And when newlywed bliss turns into a vicious crime, Cal goes boots on the ground on the trail of fugitive Arnoldo Jimenez.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Noise in the Night
programme.desc: Sisters Bre and Kayli Lasley have just moved into the perfect apartment in downtown Salt Lake City, unaware that a recent parolee is living close by. That is until one quiet night when suddenly their lives cross paths in an explosive way.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: One Last Goodbye
programme.desc: After breaking free from her controlling ex-husband, single mom Tanya Petro doesn't have much time to date. Until she meets Ron Gibson and falls helplessly in love with him. But just a few months into the relationship, Tanya mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Lost in the Desert
programme.desc: Steven Begay is a loving uncle whose nephews see as a protector. So, the irony could not be greater when his bloody body is found near a playground in New Mexico. A manhunt ensues leaving police with a major discovery that turns the case on its head.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Kill my Step-Dad
programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow
programme.desc: Brian Maurice Fuller charms his way into wealthy people's homes, only to rob them blind. He gets caught, does his time and is released. But Fuller can't resist the lure of robbing the rich. He eludes police until a tip leads them right to his door.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Ride the Rails
programme.desc: A neighbour calls 911 when she smells smoke coming from an apartment shared by Ricky Sleight and William Baldi. The police find Baldi's dead body, but Sleight escapes by riding freight trains across the country. The FBI turns to the media for help.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Rich Widow

programme.desc: When teenager Randy Baggett can't take any more of his abusive stepfather, he gets help from a friend and they beat and choke him to death. Two years later, Randy gets locked up, but he escapes twice, keeping police and detectives on their toes.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Deadly Phantom Coup
programme.desc: The CIA use psychological warfare in Guatemala, 1954, as part of the coup d'état which changed history. In a top-secret operation using covert radio broadcasts to create a 'phantom' army, combined with a guerilla invasion trained by a top agents.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Smoking Guns
programme.desc: A classic western gunfight, a battle between a US naval patrol and a German U-Boat, a stagecoach bandit hell bent on revenge and a revolutionary tactic that turned the course of a war.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Courage Under Fire
programme.desc: Four stories of courage under fire; a symbol of luck saves Marines in Korea; a handheld weapon protects Europe during the Cold War; an instrument sends a ship off to its depths and a letter helps write victory during the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: From the ashes of the Confederacy rises a bold rebel outlaw determined to get rich and get even. Jesse James is seen by many as a modern day Robin Hood, a Southern gentleman avenging the efforts of Northern businessmen to exploit his territory.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: Lester M. Gills began his crime career at an early age in a street gang in the Chicago slums.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Wild Bill: Marskman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own, by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Boarded Up Beauty
programme.desc: Nicole is on a mission to save vacant homes from the wrecking ball and her latest project is taking on a boarded up and previously condemned home from the late 80s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Cabinets Remade
programme.desc: Turning her attention to the kitchen, Nicole must get creative and figure out how to update and reuse cabinets that where in the house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bright, Open Living Room
programme.desc: Turning a duplex back into a single-family home isn't always easy, but that's just what Nicole wants to do.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Remade
programme.desc: Nicole tries to figure out a way to incorporate the old kitchen pantry into a new master bathroom and has to deal with outdated and out of order parts.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Back Yard on a Budget
programme.desc: Nicole doesn't have much to work with in the back yard, but she's making the best with what she's got. Lifting up the garage to pour a new foundation beats the cost of building a new one from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Revived Exterior
programme.desc: With work on the 4th Street house nearly complete, Nicole continues to fix up the neglected exterior.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Powder Room Predicament
programme.desc: Nicole's next project is restoring a historic mansion in the Summit district of St. Paul. Unfortunately, some key rooms have been completely ripped apart, and her first task is to rebuild the gutted powder room from scratch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Distressed Dining Room
programme.desc: Nicole turns her attention to taking the pink and gold kitsch out of the formal dining room. Restoring the floors, swapping out sconces and repairing the stained glass windows take the room out of the 1970s and back to 1904.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: In at the Deep End
programme.desc: Nicole cleans up the swimming pool and converts some garage space into a much needed changing room area. Tapping into the sewer line causes more mess than she bargained for, while Nicole also finds some time to take some swimming lessons.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Living Room Cover Up
programme.desc: Nicole takes on the living room and study, restoring the rooms to their former 1904 glory by polishing up the original woodworking details in the rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Brick by Brick Restoration
programme.desc: The Summit mansion hasn't been painted since 1972 and needs a major face lift. After years of damage, all of the outdoor wood railing and detail are rotting and need to be replaced.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Up and Away
programme.desc: Nicole puts a modern twist on the 1904 Summit Mansion in St. Paul when she installs an elevator in the middle of the home.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Newlyweds Renovate Down the Shore
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jamie and Emily both grew up going to the Jersey Shore for family vacations. Now they're looking for a beachside bargain that they can renovate, but that might be tough to come by near the beaches of the Greater Atlantic City.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Going for Gold: Espys
programme.desc: Four bakers compete to have their cupcakes eaten by the biggest names in ESPYS.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Jennette McCurdy Country Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four bakers compete to have their cupcakes showcased at a party for Jennette McCurdy.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Comic Con Cupcakes
programme.desc: Bakers compete for chance to be displayed at Comic-Con's exclusive Masquerade Party.

programme.title: Ace of Cakes: Duff Stuff, Volume One
programme.desc: Original cake master Duff Goldman has made some of the most outrageous cakes. Now he's taking a look back at some of his most over-the-top creations from a horse and a castle to a roller coaster and more.

programme.title: Ace of Cakes: Duff Stuff, Volume Two
programme.desc: Cake master Duff Goldman has totally aced it with incredible cakes over the years. Now he's reflecting on some of his most memorable masterpieces including a replica cake that goes back to the future and an Indiana Jones inspired birthday treat.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: Baked, Sealed and Delivered
programme.desc: Duff and his team blow it out of the water with a wet-and-wild birthday cake for the Aquarium of the Pacific's one-year-old seal pup. Meanwhile, the pressure is on to make a flock of 21 bird-themed cakes for a deserving group of kids.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: Duff Ties the Knot
programme.desc: Duff Goldman suits up for his biggest job yet: making the cakes for his own wedding. He and his team tackle a six-tiered classic wedding cake, an undersea cake suspended in midair and a four-tier groom's cake made entirely of meat.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: The Muppets Take Chinatown
programme.desc: Duff creates a storybook cake featuring his favourite Muppets characters for an inspiring group of students. Then the countdown is on for an explosive cake delivery to celebrate a long-time volunteer at Chinatown's Firecracker Festival.

programme.title: Duff Takes the Cake: A Cake and Bull Story
programme.desc: Duff Goldman saddles up for a bucking good time when he delivers a 100-pound bull cake to Professional Bull Riders' legendary entertainer Flint Rasmussen. Then it's time to create a motorized Zamboni cake for a team of hockey players.

programme.title: Winner Cake All: Michael Symon Needs A Cake
programme.desc: Las Vegas is synonymous with celebrating, so Giada De Laurentiis challenges the baking teams to make Vegas-themed cake decorations.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Savor the Flavor
programme.desc: Savor the flavor of some tasty treats, from Eli's scrumptious Bavarian Apple Tart to Necco's classic bite-size Mary Jane. Then, the mystery of the orange-colored, banana-flavored Circus Peanuts is solved.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Beef
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the tastiest beef dishes in restaurants across America from traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Appetizers

programme.desc: In Lexington, Texas folks line up early on Saturday mornings for Snow's BBQ.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Rigs
programme.desc: Bill Rousseau transformed a retired Cessna airplane into a smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: SEC Inside: Women's Basketball Tournament
programme.desc: Focusing on select teams and exploring previously unaired footage from all aspects.

programme.title: TrueSouth: New Orleans
programme.desc: From Liuzza's and Mandina's – two Sicilian corner stores that have become neighborhood Creole Italian restaurants – look at how and why some stories get erased while others become defining narratives.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Thunder and Lightning
programme.desc: Revisiting the fabled Bulldogs and tracking the relationship between Clark and Palmeiro, known as 'Thunder and Lightning.' Director Rory Karpf brings closure to men who should be remembered for what they did and not for what they didn't do.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Book of Manning
programme.desc: Written into the pages of football folklore is the Manning legend, a story started by patriarch, Archie, with chapters featuring his sons, Cooper, Peyton and Eli. Director Rory Karpf explores how a tragedy shaped the course of their lives.

programme.title: Lark Rise to Candleford
programme.desc: Dorcas and Sir Timothy try and help Queenie solve the mystery of who created an embroidered a panel found on a grave. Alf's poaching leads him and Edmund into danger. Caroline returns from prison determined to mend her ways.

programme.title: Heartland: Hotshot
programme.desc: When a family vacation is cancelled at the last minute, Jack and Georgie head off for a long-awaited fishing trip that lands them in a situation they hadn't bargained for.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About That: Trees Company/ Now You See Me
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are playing in their treehouse. Nick wonders what it would be like to stay up in that tree all the time. The Cat in the Hat has friends who know what it's like, and he takes them to Jimmer Jammer Jungle to meet animals that live in trees.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Stargazing on the Night Train/ Get Into Nature!
programme.desc: Sidney Sinovenator takes the family to his favourite stargazing spot and teaches them about stars.

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Journey to the Subnivean Zone

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Return of the Yeti
programme.desc: Beginning in Kathmandu, Josh Gates heads high into the Himalayas of Nepal to obtain scientific evidence of the legendary Yeti. This time his mission is personal, and it will take him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Extra Finds: The Monster and the Mountain
programme.desc: Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves, examine ancient artifacts, and investigate the mystical ties the legendary creature holds with the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Out of Thin Air
programme.desc: The hunt for the Yeti continues as Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan, where Josh uses bait to force a more personal encounter with the creature.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Unmasking the Myth
programme.desc: Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive creature. Then he returns to the US where all of his samples are analyzed to find out if the Yeti is real.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Deepest Seas to Highest Mountains
programme.desc: Josh searches for adventure both high and low beginning with a hunt for the utopian paradise Shangri-La in the Himalaya Mountains' ancient sky caves. Later, Josh dives deep under the Indian Ocean's waters to chase down a pirate's billion-dollar treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Beyond The Secret
programme.desc: Josh Gates traverses the US to uncover the mysteries of The Secret.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Crystal Skull Obsession
programme.desc: Josh investigates the iconic mystery of the crystal skulls. He visits sites in Belize, Spain and Scotland where the legends are born from obsession.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Best of The Fish Guyz

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Islamorada, FL Keys - Sea Creatures Of The Deep!
programme.desc: George Poveromo docks his MARC VI at Bud 'n Mary's, an institution in the Florida Keys. He and Chase Fulton, one their top offshore captains, set forth to deep-drop and 'hand crank' for barrelfish.

programme.title: Silver Kings: Shake 'n' Bake
programme.desc: Tarpon angler Baker Bishop joins Jared in Islamorada.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Tarpon in the Harbor

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Gold Will Surrender
programme.desc: Dave's crew is hunting for better ground and behind on their gold target. To turn their season around, Dave calls on a mining legend for help searching for gold at the historic Birdseye mine in Montana.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wisconsin Washout
programme.desc: Marty takes on a huge diverter trench to deflect torrents of storm water from devasting the homestead of musician Lou and his girlfriend Stacy. But a storm is the forecast, so no one can predict if this rescue will succeed.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Abandoned and Alone
programme.desc: In Montana, the Raneys help Beth and Mike Ettinger who live in an abandoned ghost town where many previous homesteaders failed. Survival is a battle on this homestead that is stalked by a mountain lion and void of any livestock, water or food.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: All or Nothing

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Artist Anonymous

programme.desc: Everyday heroes work together to stop a mysterious master criminal.
