programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: It's Pony: Useful/ Stompy!
programme.desc: Annie fears Dad will find Pony useless to the farm and get ride of him. Then, while fighting with Dog, Pony accidentally stomps on Annie's foot, just when she is all set to play soccer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Feral Friends/ Don't Wake Patrick
programme.desc: A strange moon turns everyone in town into wild animals, and Sandy's the only one who can save them. Patrick is sleepwalking and SpongeBob can't wake him up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: My Leg!/ Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way no matter what. Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Broken Alarm/ Karen's Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob breaks his alarm clock and nothing else is loud enough to wake him up. And, Karen learns that kids grow up too fast after her new child arrives in the mail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sharks vs. Pods/ CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head with the Sharks. Plankton creates an evil clone of SpongeBob.

programme.desc: Patrick introduces SpongeBob to his society of dullards and doofuses. /Patrick takes his grime to a new level, playing around in the trash so much that he's unrecognizable.

programme.desc: The Prinoth Panther is the ultimate all-terrain, multi-purpose work vehicle. It’s a crane, it’s a tractor, it’s a digger, it’s anything you need it to be. Then, a construction company is building an underground pipeline using the Tesmec 1075 trencher.

programme.title: Heavy Metal Monsters: Mountain Breaker

programme.title: Why Planes Crash: Chopper Down
programme.desc: Despite being the choice vehicle for remote rescues and rapid responses, helicopters have their own set of dangers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Slam Dunks
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pantsing With the Stars
programme.desc: The guys pair up to share educational ideas with perplexed parents, then teach Krav Maga to martial arts newbies. When one joker refuses, he becomes the big loser, and faces an opponent that scares the pants off him.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Grandfathers of Anarchy
programme.desc: Noah Gardenswartz knows what a drug dealer shouldn't say, Gina Yashere talks juice cleanses, and Matteo Lane has an Easter bunny he'd swipe right for.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Churnt Up
programme.desc: Find out what food Clayton English describes as 'edible gentrification,' what Julian McCullough thinks you shouldn't say when you're Amish, and what Jessimae Peluso steals from an audience member.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout
programme.desc: Three comics enter into a battle of high stakes comedic one-upmanship.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Other's Day

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Devine

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Old Lady Afterlife

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Free Kitchens
programme.desc: Julian McCullough knows what not to tell his kids, Arden Myrin reveals Julian is a mistake she'd make at a wedding, and Joel Kim Booster defends a famous chef.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: That's My Wife

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: White Tasty

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Restaurants
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the hidden truths of dining out. He explains why tipping is a custom worth ditching, shows that experts can't tell the difference between wines and reveals that mislabeled seafood is rampant in the industry.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cars
programme.desc: Adam dives into the much-beloved auto industry and exposes the surprising truths behind car dealerships, and the fact that the concept of jaywalking was created by auto manufacturers to blame pedestrians for car crashes.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Security
programme.desc: Adam Conover sets his sights on 'security theatre,' explaining that airport security wastes too much of our time and money, medicine safety seals do nothing to protect us and your credit card number isn’t remotely secure.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Giving
programme.desc: Adam tackles the secret history of diamond engagement rings and explains why you should stop giving food pantries leftover canned goods.

programme.desc: Two friends must come up with $200, to pay drug dealer Big Worm for marijuana they smoked.

programme.title: Movie: Next Friday
programme.desc: A streetwise man visits his cousin and his uncle, who have recently won the lottery.

programme.title: Movie: Friday After Next
programme.desc: Two cousins move in together and work as nighttime security guards. Their house is robbed on Christmas Eve and they team up to track the criminal down.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Movie: That Awkward Moment
programme.desc: Three single guys have sworn to remain bachelors in support of their heartbroken friend. As their current conquests become more than flings, the trio is tasked with keeping their relationships under wraps, and must examine just where things are headed.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Born and Raised
programme.desc: Leslie falls prey to some 'gotcha' journalism while promoting her new book. Ann is determined to bond with Ron and April.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Rangers
programme.desc: In an effort to protest the inequality of Ron's boys-only trip, Leslie takes the girls on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: End of the World
programme.desc: A local Pawnee group predicts that the end of the world is coming, causing Leslie and the others to contemplate their lives.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Meet N' Greet
programme.desc: Andy and April decide to throw a Halloween party at their house, which upsets Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ms. Knope Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Leslie and Andy visit Ben and April in Washington, leaving Leslie feeling overwhelmed.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Soda Tax
programme.desc: Leslie engages on her first mission as city councilor: passing a city wide tax on giant sodas. Chris helps Andy get in shape to prepare for his police entrance exam.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: How a Bill Becomes a Law
programme.desc: Leslie works with a fellow councilman to extend the community pool hours.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Sex Education
programme.desc: An STD outbreak amongst Pawnee seniors prompts Leslie to conduct a sex education class. Tom adjusts to life without gadgets and Ben and April meet Congressman Murray for the first time.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Halloween Surprise
programme.desc: A new job offer for Ben causes Leslie to contemplate their future. Ron and Andy go trick-or-treating.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ben's Parents
programme.desc: After being warned about Ben's divorced parents, Leslie gets nervous as she prepares to meet them. With the help of Jean Ralphio, Tom prepares to pitch his new business to Ron.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie vs. April
programme.desc: Leslie gets upset when April tries to get Lot 48 made into a dog park. Meanwhile, Tom enlists Ben's help as he tries to launch his new business venture, and Andy hones his crime scene investigation skills.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Commons
programme.desc: Leslie makes a public appeal for park design suggestions, but becomes suspicious when the best design comes from an architect in Eagleton. Meanwhile, Tom enlists the help of the office as he sets up his 'Rent-a-Swag' business.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Diane
programme.desc: Ron, Diane and Leslie attend a wood working awards dinner after Ron receives a nomination.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Two Parties
programme.desc: Ann throws a bachelorette party for Leslie and Chris throws a game night at Ben's.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Women in Garbage
programme.desc: In order to get more women in government, Leslie and April handle a garbage route. Tom learns about basketball from Andy and Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ann's Decision
programme.desc: After several unsuccessful relationships Ann makes a dramatic life decision. Ben enlists the help of Chris, Tom and Ron to choose a caterer for the wedding.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Emergency Response
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben organize a black tie gala to raise money for their park, but their plans are derailed when a city wide emergency response drill is called.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Leslie and Ben
programme.desc: Leslie and Ben have only two hours to complete a year-long project. Ron gets in trouble when his temper gets the better of him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Correspondent's Lunch
programme.desc: Leslie's planned address for a big media event is stolen, leaving her speechless. Ben starts his new job.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again
programme.desc: A man, who feels a great deal of regret about his life choices, wishes he could go back in time to change a few things. One morning, he wakes up to find he's been given a second chance to be 17 again.

programme.title: Movie: 17 Again
programme.desc: A man, who feels a great deal of regret about his life choices, wishes he could go back in time to change a few things. One morning, he wakes up to find he's been given a second chance to be 17 again.

programme.title: Movie: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples agree to vacation at an island resort while their friends are there to work on their marriage. Once all of the couples arrive on the remote island, they learn that marriage counselling is mandatory for all of them and they cannot leave.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Lost in the Bayou
programme.desc: At Lil G's Kajun Restaurant in Louisiana, Chef Robert Irvine meets Therese, who bought the restaurant 12 years ago, having no experience.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sammies and Stew
programme.desc: Guy's digging into some super sandwiches and savoury stew starting in Santa Fe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Key West
programme.desc: Guy's checking out some of the awesome eats of Key West, Fla. From a funky little shack serving up New England seafood with coastal twists to a husband and wife team dishing up standout fish tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Carnivore Creations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's getting right to the meat of the matter with some carnivore creations. In Portland, Ore., a bomb butchery puttin' out porchetta and a unique style of prosciutto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Greats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going global with international flavours. In Miami, a funky Haitian joint cooks up island favourites like griot and fresh red snapper. In Los Angeles, a 70-year-old Italian spot serves up their legendary spins on pizza and lasagna.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Legacies
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting spots keeping up with their family ties. In Pleasantville, N.J., a wife carries on her husband's legacy with his down-home chicken and waffles and righteous ribs. In Colorado Springs, family recipes are made at a BBQ joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Global Goodies
programme.desc: Guy takes a walk down memory lane to check on some of his favorite DDD finds. He gets a second helping at his first Peruvian place in Chicago. In Seattle, tradition stands firm at an old school chili parlor. Plus, local dives in Minneapolis and Portland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom and Dad
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hanging out at real-deal mom-and-pop spots. In Logan, Utah, a family-run Indian joint hooked up to a gas station with Dad dishin' out specialties from his homeland.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Culinary Journey
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road for on an off-the-chain culinary journey. On the Big Island, a Filipino-Hawaiian mashup making a name for leaving diners speechless.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Meat
programme.desc: Guy's digging into a meat lover's paradise. In Colorado Springs, a Jamaican joint dishes out killer curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, a funky beer bar serves up wild boar sliders and outrageous pork belly mac and cheese fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Pancake House Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is putting a new spin on classic neighborhood pancake house dishes, like mini Denver omelet frittatas with crispy hammy croutons and silver dollar tropical pancakes with mascarpone whipped cream.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Diner Classics
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows diners, so when his chef friends come to the ranch with their version of diner classics, they bring their A-game.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Food! Friends! Fun!
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has her pals Kevin and Kristen, who are fierce card competitors, over for a long weekend visit. Wanting to spend some real quality time with them, Valerie is prepping all of her comfort foods in advance.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Good Morning Drummond Ranch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond welcomes the morning at the Drummond ranch and makes a pairing of savory breakfast kabobs and sweet breakfast kabobs with shortcut doughnut holes and honey yogurt dipping sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Double Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a half-empty nest while her daughters are off at college, but she still needs good, hearty food at her fingertips for her hungry teenage sons. So she's cooking up dishes that she can serve half now and freeze the rest for another time.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: All About Kids
programme.desc: Ree Drummond opens up in a fun Q and A about kids, with some of the questions coming from her pint-sized fans. Her answers include an 11-carton cake with a simple trick and vanilla buttercream frosting and a ranch pork chop sheet pan supper.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Special Day
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's daughter Paige is spending the day watching some of the younger kids, so Ree packs them some fun treats for a late-afternoon picnic. She makes Animal Crackers, Crunchy Cereal Chicken Fingers, Cucumber Finger Sandwiches.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Midwest Mex
programme.desc: To celebrate her husband Nick's birthday, Molly Yeh surprises him by making his favourite Mexican cuisine- with a Midwestern twist of course! She cooks up a taco hotdish, chili-lime fruit salad and ham and cheese jalapeno poppers.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Homemade Happy Hour
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli invites her glam squad for happy hour, but doesn't wait for the end of a tough workweek on the Valerie's Home Cooking set to start the party!

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Sibling Supper
programme.desc: A few of Kardea's brothers and sisters are getting together at her place to catch up and share a meal. She's making a slow-roasted onion dip as an appetizer along with grilled garlic bread.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Jade's After Party
programme.desc: After Jade's big volleyball game, Giada De Laurentiis invites her daughter's teammates to celebrate at a fun-filled after party.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Hit Re-Fresh

programme.title: Tournament of Champions: Round One Continues

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: We Called It Mr. Pinky

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hi, Mr. Horned One
programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sleep Tight, Puddin' Pop
programme.desc: Charlie puts himself in a compromising position when he spends a drunken evening with his stalker, Rose. Later, he comes face-to-face with her father, who demands to know what Charlie's intentions are with his daughter.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Voodoo That I Do Do
programme.desc: After his overtures toward a ballet teacher are rejected, Charlie will stop at nothing to prove that he can persuade her to go out with him. When he talks Jake into taking her dance class to help his cause, his plan is derailed when Jake falls for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Spit-Covered Cobbler
programme.desc: When Kandi's old car breaks down, Alan ends up leasing her a new one. Charlie warns him to break things off with her, but when Alan spends his last dime on Kandi's root canal and can't pay Judith's alimony, Charlie is forced to cover for him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Golly Moses, She's a Muffin
programme.desc: Charlie's not happy when he learns that Kandi has been living in sin with Alan in his house, particularly because of his own recent dry spell with women. Things begin to look up for Charlie when a special visitor comes knocking on his door.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Always a Bridesmaid, Never a Burro
programme.desc: Alan is depressed that his hot, young girlfriend, Kandi, has left him to go stay with his bitter ex-wife, Judith, who has brainwashed her against him. Meanwhile, Kandi sets Judith up on a date with her father, Andy.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: And the Plot Moistens
programme.desc: Jake's teacher, Francine, calls Alan and Judith in to discuss Jake's lack of interest in school. Desperate to communicate with someone intelligent while continuing to see his airhead girlfriend, Kandi, Alan starts a platonic relationship with Francine.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Once With Aunt Sophie
programme.desc: When a cute girl from Jake's school invites him to a party, Charlie butts in on Alan's milestone moment with his son by offering his own words of wisdom on women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Arguments for the Quickie
programme.desc: When Charlie finds out that Mia is in town with her dance troupe, he opts not to see her and tries to convince Alan that he's over her. Charlie gets another surprise when Mia explains that she wants something personal from him, his sperm.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Pistol-Packin' Hermaphrodite
programme.desc: Wedding bells loom as Charlie and Mia make their wedding plans, but when their families meet, things immediately begin to fall apart. Ultimately, Charlie and his bride-to-be end up deciding on a small ceremony in Vegas.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Working for Caligula
programme.desc: Now that newlywed Alan has moved out, Charlie returns to his bachelor lifestyle.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?
programme.desc: Alan feels guilty when he learns that Charlie and Mia didn't tie the knot because she had wanted him and Jake to move out. Meanwhile, Charlie and his rock star neighbour don't get along.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Live Woman of Proven Fertility
programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity
programme.desc: Though Charlie despises his sharp-tongued, passive aggressive mother, he's strangely attracted to Lydia, an attractive, blonde high-end real estate agent, just like his mother. Unfortunately, the similarities don't end there.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Repeated Blows to His Unformed Head
programme.desc: When Berta brings her pregnant daughter, the one she thought would make something of herself, to Charlie's house to help clean, Alan gets to satisfy one of his secret fetishes. Meanwhile, Charlie ventures out of his familiar Malibu surroundings.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Release the Dogs
programme.desc: Unable to sleep, Alan takes one of Charlie's suggestions and goes for a jog on the beach. When his jog takes a disastrous turn, he then turns to a psychiatrist in the hopes that discovering the source of his insomnia will help alleviate it.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Corey's Been Dead for An Hour
programme.desc: Charlie becomes annoyed with Alan for constantly sponging off him and promising to cover the tab 'next time.' When Alan tries to leave Charlie the cheque for dinner with two women, Charlie tries to beat him at his own game.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Whale of a Tale

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Truth or Dare

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Family Unfair
programme.desc: Christine becomes envious as Richard and New Christine plan for their new baby and decides to ask Richard for his help so she can have one too.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Sweet Charity

programme.title: North Woods Law: Take the Plunge
programme.desc: Spring arrives and things start plunging through the ice. The wardens investigate a case of injured bald eagles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mysteries in the Moose State
programme.desc: Some of the wardens enter the annual moose-hunting lottery. Meanwhile, Craven tracks down the mythical Main mountain lion and the wardens try to find an elderly man lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Warden vs. Wild
programme.desc: In the final weeks of moose season, not everyone is following the rules. The wardens investigate a family suspected of killing and wasting a moose. Blanchard and Christianson have to stop an illegally harvested moose from crossing the border.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Nothing to Hide
programme.desc: Officer Jim Cyrs and Lt. Saunders rush to the scene of an ATV accident. Officer James Benvenuti works with K-9 Cora to track down a suspect. Officer Eric Hannett gets backup from Lieutenant Bill Boudreau when dealing with a suspicious fisherman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fighting the Flood
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas intervenes when a black bear cub gets separated from its mother and wreaks havoc on a small community. As heavy rains cause rivers to flood, Officer Eric Fluette races to rescue a man whose canoe has flipped in the rapids.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: Crime 360: Gilpin Court Shooting

programme.title: Crime 360: Midnight Shootout
programme.desc: A gun battle breaks out in a quiet Cleveland suburb causing chaos for the neighbourhood. In the morning, a young father of two is found dead in his bedroom, and a single bullet may help to catch the killer.

programme.title: Crime 360: Fatal Feud

programme.title: City Confidential: Boston: Betrayal in Beantown
programme.desc: When the Boston police are fooled into believing a black man killed a pregnant white woman, the city is the scene of strong racism.

programme.title: City Confidential: Durham: Dangerous Housewife
programme.desc: A philandering and big-spending wife is suspected of killing her husband to get his money.

programme.title: City Confidential: Carthage: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: The residents of a Texas town are stunned when a well-liked citizen is accused of murder.

programme.title: City Confidential: Milwaukee: The Legend of Bambi Bembenek
programme.desc: A curvaceous former Playboy Bunny was charged with the murder of her husband's ex-wife.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Let's Play Pirate
programme.desc: When Nikki Orvin fell in love and married Damon Bamberg she had no idea what a twisted family she was now a part of. Soon after giving birth to Damon's son, Nikki realized that she was not the only woman in her husband's life.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Breakfast for a Dead Man
programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Rum Chaser/ Murder for Nothing
programme.desc: Darlene George and her 13-year-old son are the victims of a random home invasion robbery. But when police arrive, Darlene's husband, Winston George is found in the basement, hog-tied and strangled.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Bloody Footprint
programme.desc: Maurice Goins, a friendly neighbor who provides meals to other tenants in his apartment complex, is found murdered in his bedroom. The case goes cold, until Lakewood, Ohio police suddenly receive a tip and the investigation is thrown into overdrive.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Crime
programme.desc: After surviving the brutal stabbing that leaves her two sons dead in 1996, Dallas housewife Darlie Routier urges police to find the intruder she claims is the killer. To her horror, she becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Trial
programme.desc: Amid a media frenzy, Darlie Routier's trial begins in the small, conservative town of Kerrville, Texas. Prosecutors know they will be up against a formidable adversary when Darlie's family hires one of Dallas' top attorneys, Doug Mulder.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Woman
programme.desc: The trial of Darlie Routier heats up. Facing one of Texas' top defense lawyers, the prosecution argues that Darlie's actions and demeanor are not that of a grieving mother but of a person capable of murdering her own children.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Fight
programme.desc: After 21 years, the Darlie Routier story culminates in this final episode where Darlie's current defense team explores alternative theories that the jury may not have fully considered and lays out their strategy for a retrial.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Crime
programme.desc: After surviving the brutal stabbing that leaves her two sons dead in 1996, Dallas housewife Darlie Routier urges police to find the intruder she claims is the killer. To her horror, she becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Trial
programme.desc: Amid a media frenzy, Darlie Routier's trial begins in the small, conservative town of Kerrville, Texas. Prosecutors know they will be up against a formidable adversary when Darlie's family hires one of Dallas' top attorneys, Doug Mulder.

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Woman

programme.title: The Last Defense: Darlie Routier: The Fight
programme.desc: After 21 years, the Darlie Routier story culminates in this final episode where Darlie's current defense team explores alternative theories that the jury may not have fully considered and lays out their strategy for a retrial.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Natalie Wood: Death in Dark Water
programme.desc: Nearly four decades after the unexplained drowning death of Hollywood star Natalie Wood, Los Angeles County Sheriff's Investigators speak for the first time and tell '48 Hours' that her then-husband, actor Robert Wagner, is now a person of interest.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: When Crystal McDowell vanished outside Houston during Hurricane Harvey, 48 HRS gained unprecedented access inside the police command center as the heavy rains and high floodwaters hindered the search and washed away vital evidence. Maureen Maher reports.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Memorial Day Murder
programme.desc: Chris Northam is an entrepreneur building his extreme sports business in the suburb of Roseville, California. When he is fatally gunned down in his warehouse, detectives look to his disgruntled employees and his mistress in search of the killer.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Body on Bowden Road
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Stephanie Shea Graham is found murdered on a desolate road, detectives gather clues and question all those closest to her. When the truth is finally revealed, the identity of her killer will prove to be more shocking than ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hunting Season
programme.desc: A 27 year old mother of two disappeared from a small vacation town in Wisconsin in 2008. Family, friends, local reporters and police investigators recall the fear and sadness the shocking crime instilled on their tight-knit community.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Prominent business people John and Liz Calvert, vanish in 2008 from upscale paradise Hilton Head, SC. Friends, sheriff's investigators and local reporters recall the shock and disbelief the couple disappeared without a trace from a place so peaceful.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Hold the Line
programme.desc: In August 1992, millionaire Tennessee landowner Allen Roberts arrives home to discover his wife is missing. He tells police he received a ransom call for Doe's safe return. Slowly, the town turns on Allen: until police take note of one odd neighbor.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: To the Death
programme.desc: When two young men are found shot in an apartment hallway, Kenda must rely on his inner lie detector to figure out which victim was no victim at all. Then, police investigate a murder in broad daylight and nearly get killed themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: High in the mountains above Colorado Springs, a woman's frozen body is found along a switchback road. Before investigators can determine who's responsible for her death, they'll need to figure out what brought her here in the first place.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood Relative
programme.desc: After a father is found shot in front of his home, Kenda uncovers a vengeful motive behind a deadly family feud. Then, a church of God turns into a house of horrors as officers face a life-or-death decision when confronted by a knife-wielding psychopath.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: Hikers come across a horrific scene: a dead man left nude, beaten and bound in the mountain wilderness. But when the young victim's checkered past is uncovered, Kenda must wade through a laundry list of potential suspects to find the man's killer.

programme.title: Shattered: Butcher on Mincey Road
programme.desc: When a woman's marriage takes a violent turn, her daughter seeks refuge at the nearby home of a caring neighbor. She has no idea, however, that the place she considers a safe haven is not at all what it seems.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Sam Giancana
programme.desc: Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, let alone find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of longtime Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Alan Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise
programme.desc: A former ship captain and his wife decide to buy a classic beach cottage a block away from the water. The location is perfect but the interior of the home has structural and layout flaws.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home
programme.desc: A couple's Dewey Beach home has become cramped and in need of reconfiguration. With a new open-concept layout, Marnie aims to preserve the integrity of the house while improving the flow and maximizing space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Rare and Recycled
programme.desc: A determined couple has found a 1960s gem of a beach home with a rare design element: a unique breezeway running through its center. The couple is serious about preserving its classic look and expanding upon the unique breezeway.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Tranquil Retreat
programme.desc: Chris crashes TJ and Julie's backyard, a sad space with a small patio and no landscaping. The crew brings life back to the yard by adding a huge paver patio with a dining table, a built-in barbecue island and a tranquil water feature.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Jamestown Moose Lodge
programme.desc: Eager to save some late Victorian architecture, the 'dawgs' accept an invitation to salvage a hundred-year-old Moose Lodge in Jamestown, NY. The ten hour drive proves worth it as they collect unique stair spindles and perplexing turrets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging a House in Roanoke, VA, into Repurposed Housing Items
programme.desc: The entire Black Dog Salvage crew pitches in to help save parts of a house in Roanoke, VA. Main items include floors, trim, front porch columns, and a large built in cabinet. Back at the shop, Ted builds a fire pit and fountain from old syrup kettles.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Burnout House
programme.desc: The team goes to Lexington, VA, to see what they can save from a fire-damaged house that had recently been converted to apartments.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Bell Tower and Sign
programme.desc: Recruited by a local church, the Dawgs head across town to remove a weakening bell tower, and things turn out to be more dangerous than expected. Later, Mike works with a customer to design a checkout counter that's as practical as it is stunning.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Drayton Mill
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to the Drayton Mill in Spartanburg, SC. Key items salvaged include a large fan and valves. Mike builds a new desk for his office out of a salvaged airplane wing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Beechcraft Airplane Salvage
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs try something a little different by bidding on a 1947 Beechcraft airplane. Mike goes a little over budget to win the auction and the crew has to hire professionals to figure out how to disassemble it properly.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Good Eats: Feeling Punchy
programme.desc: Alton brings back punch into the spotlight.

programme.title: Good Eats: Age of Asparagus
programme.desc: Learn everything you need to know about the first vegetable of the season: asparagus.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione Vs. Dang
programme.desc: Vietnamese chef Thai Dang fishes for a win from the Chairman during his battle against Iron Chef Marc Forgione. Judges Jonathan Waxman and Tanya Holland will determine a winner.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Anderson
programme.desc: Richmond, Virginia's schnitzel queen, Chef Brittanny Anderson, hopes that she doesn't leave Kitchen Stadium feeling blue after battling one of the Chairman's best, Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Thiam
programme.desc: Brooklyn based chef Pierre Thiam takes on Iron Chef Bobby Flay in a culinary showdown. Can Chef Thiam's Senegalese dishes overshadow Iron Chef Flay's Southwestern spin?

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amsterdam
programme.desc: Look no further than the picture-perfect city of Amsterdam for the best eating in the Netherlands. Built on simple classics like bitterballen and haring, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the Dutch destination so delicious.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lima
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the most famous foods in this Peruvian city by the sea.

programme.desc: Timmy decides to run for Student Body President to capture the affections of Trixie Tang.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Late Fee/ Bullhop
programme.desc: The endless craziness of New York complicates the returning of a DVD; the Turtles try to help a distressed mutant.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Longest Fight/ Hypno! Part Deux
programme.desc: The Turtles have a hard time watching their idol skateboard while stopping a burglary. Hypno-Potamus returns and causes havoc at April's homecoming dance.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Origami Tsunami/ Donnie’s Gifts
programme.desc: Our wannabe heroes try to solve the biggest little problem in the city. The Turtles have to fight their bad habits and a mutant chef.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Big Fairy Share Scare
programme.desc: Timmy finds out that he has to share his fairies with the new girl in school, Chloe Carmichael. But when Chloe realizes she can use her magic for good, she wishes everyone in Dimmsdale would share everything, and chaos ensues.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Mavis tries to prove she can care for a living creature by rescuing a 'bad egg.' The kids try to watch the last episode of their favourite show, Hotel Pennsylvania.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Totally Awesome Battle Jack
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Whoa-Oh, I'm On A Roll
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Blackout!/ What'd I Miss?
programme.desc: Candace is put in charge of the boys right before the entire city loses electricity and they use the opportunity to make the most out of the blackout. Phineas and the gang try training domesticated squirrels to live in the wild.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: El Fuego
programme.desc: Professional mech-wrestler El Fuego is intent on becoming the toughest fighter in San Fransokyo and decides he must beat the strongest challenger he can find, Baymax.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Countdown to Catastrophe: Part 1
programme.desc: Hiro proposes fixing a failed Krei Tech prototype for an energy amplifier as his first semester project, but Professor Granville rejects his idea because it’s too dangerous.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Countdown to Catastrophe: Part 2
programme.desc: Hiro continues to ignore Professor Granville’s warnings and perfects his energy amplifier. Obake steals it from SFIT’s Open House and gains control of Baymax, who turns on Hiro.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: The Takeover
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Lagoon of White Agony Plains!
programme.desc: Scrooge reteams with his conniving ex-partner and old flame, Goldie O' Gilt, to find a long-lost golden lagoon, but Glomgold has other plans.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Save Summer
programme.desc: Phineas, Ferb and the gang host a global concert – just as Doof's latest '-inator' invention moves Earth, putting summer in jeopardy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Last Day of Summer
programme.desc: Candace uses the last day of summer to bust her brothers, but things go out of control with Doofenshmirtz's Do-Over-Inator.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: The Final Hand!
programme.desc: In the Bey Carnival semifinals, Dante clashes with Joe while Fumiya goes up against Lodin; the battles have never been wilder and the stakes have never been higher!

programme.title: Yo-Kai Watch: Nate's Secret Past/ Whisper's Secret Past/ Jibanyan's Secret Past
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: A Haunted House for Everyone!
programme.desc: Harper and Sarah are excited to visit a haunted house, and they end up having a bit too much fun!

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
programme.desc: When Zoey brings home her first 'serious' boyfriend, a boy from school also named Andre, Dre takes an instant dislike to him for many reasons that include the fact that he's white, from France and rather worldly for a kid.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Katy Keene: Chapter Six: Mama Said
programme.desc: Katy ends up in a sticky situation with her clients. Pepper is confronted about what she is up to. Jorge learns he might be losing his coveted performance spot. Josie is nervous about her mother coming to town to her EP release and meet Alexander.

programme.title: Legacies: There's a Place Where the Lost Things Go
programme.desc: In order to deal with their recent trauma, Emma suggests the students participate in a group simulation that transports them to a film noir world. Hope, Josei, Lizzie, MG and Rafael quickly learn they must confront their conflicts head-on.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Fridge
programme.desc: Monica and Phoebe compete to see who can find an escort for Rachel to a charity event.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Little Jerry
programme.desc: George finds the perfect woman, only she's incarcerated; Kramer gets a new pet rooster.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Vince Takes a Bath
programme.desc: When Vince throws out his back, Joyce conveniently disappears, leaving Mike and Molly to care for him. Meanwhile, the newlyweds struggle to write personalized thank-you notes for their wedding presents.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Four Balls, Two Bats and One Mitt
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey decide to spice things up in the bedroom.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: A Night to Remember
programme.desc: It's prom night, and all three Goldberg kids have big plans, which go awry. Barry plans big romantic gestures for Lainey while Erica and Geoff try to go to prom together, but it doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Shall We Play a Game?
programme.desc: Adam inadvertently gets Barry kicked out of the cool group of friends at school and must come up with a plan to get his brother back in. Adam convinces Barry and his friends he has the skills to hack into the school computer system to change their grades.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Stalking Dead
programme.desc: Max and Caroline get their big break when they're cast as zombie extras after they finally arrive at the movie set where Randy is working. Back at home, Han and Oleg try their hand at construction after firing the contractor working on the dessert bar.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Negotiation Episode
programme.desc: Malik puts his foot down when Robin tells him to stop fooling around with other women.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Back to School
programme.desc: Mike finds that Mandy's steady boyfriend Kyle’s new interest in philosophy is distracting him from his work at The Outdoor Man Store. A solution may be in the offing when Mike gets a visit from Brody and Uncle Ray.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Vivica A. Fox, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Maz Jobrani.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Miller vs. Alford
programme.desc: A former military expert interrogator, interrogates a woman to find out if she’s been cheating on her boyfriend with her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Lose That Bad Boyfriend or Pay Me/ Dumb Home
programme.desc: Former judge Kevin Ross presides over various small claims cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: A Luge Mistake/ Ticketed Off
programme.desc: An injured street luge racer; a dispute between former roommates over a parking ticket.

programme.title: Right This Minute

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Commons vs. Baker
programme.desc: After his girlfriend confesses to cheating with an ex, an Illinois man begins to doubt he is the father.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Active Duty Drama/ Dumpster Dive
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for the return of property. Former roommates dispute a fine for illegal trash disposal.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Angry Wives vs. Hot Mistresses
programme.desc: Ed wants his wedding day to be filled with joy by trying to make the love of his life Alexis his wife, but the feeling isn’t mutual. Why? Ed has cheated on Alexis on multiple occasions with various women including her good friend Bella.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman had a relationship with a man on and off for five years and they have two children together. She claims he physically abused her numerous times and she has the pictures to prove it. She’s now suing her ex for an unpaid loan and emotional distress.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: Taking Too Darn Long, Being Shoddy and Not Checking The Engine.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include 'Ditching An Ex' and 'Stiffing a Screenwriter.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Not So Idle Threats/ Little Black Book Full of Dirty
programme.desc: Harassment; books taken for a book drive contain surprises.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: In a dispute over $1900, the plaintiff says it was for a trip to take with the defendant while the defendants says it was for her to use as she chose. Tenants are sued for hoarding pets which caused damages; the defendants say it was the prior tenants.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: How Could You Marry the Man Who Killed Your Father?
programme.desc: Lance and his fiancée’s father Andre got into an altercation that led to Andre becoming brain dead and eventually his death. Now Andre's family is questioning Nikki and believe she's covering up for Lance.

programme.title: Maury: Chemo Left Me Sterile ... I Can't Be Your Child's Father!
programme.desc: Jerry abandoned Netta while she was pregnant, and is denying her baby. Jeff is denying Stefanie's baby, saying a medical condition prevents him from having kids. Deondray says Shanndoria's pinning her baby on him due to his successful rap career.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Unhappily Ever After
programme.desc: Tera isn’t certain her marriage can be saved. Her husband, Roberto did the unthinkable by groping her friend Morgan’s breasts.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: The Beverly Hills Hoarder
programme.desc: A woman is so addicted to hoarding expensive goods that her fiancé says either the stuff goes or he does. Plus, a daughter gives an ultimatum to her hoarder mom.

programme.title: Movie: Religulous
programme.desc: Bill Maher interviews Christians, Catholics, Jews, Muslims, Mormons, scientists, gays and atheists in a documentary on how having faith in religion is ridiculous, as there are too many holes in the stories that create their beliefs.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: Grosse Pointe Blank
programme.desc: A hitman returns home to do a little business and attend his high school reunion.

programme.desc: A transgender punk rocker tours the United States in order to steal back her songs from her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity

programme.title: Black-ish: The Dozens
programme.desc: Dre schools Andre Jr. in the art of 'playing the dozens,' trash talking someone into submission, after he's intimidated by a bully at school, but he succeeds a little too well with his plan; Diane develops a fear of the dark.

programme.title: Black-ish: Waltz in a Minor
programme.desc: Dre's teenage cousin Kyra needs a place to stay and the Johnsons decide to take her in, but they have different approaches to helping her adjust to suburban life. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane try to vet Kyra on social media to get information on her.

programme.title: Penn & Teller: Fool Us: Magical Moxie

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Adrienne Houghton

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Comeback
programme.desc: Jerry discovers that a tennis pro is a terrible player. George comes up with a comeback to a comment, but it is a little too late. Elaine is intrigued by a person's video picks.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: St. Patrick's Day
programme.desc: Carl and Samuel host a St. Patrick's Day party in hopes of meeting women. Meanwhile, Molly reveals juicy secrets from her previous St. Patrick's Day excursions to Mike.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: You Do Know What the Lollipop's For
programme.desc: Walden starts to feel his age when a friend's daughter comes to town.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Feeling left out, Barry attempts to create a divide in Adam and Pops's relationship, as they debate the merits of the recently released Batman movie. Meanwhile, Erica purposely blows her college interview at Penn State.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Family Takes Care of Beverly
programme.desc: When Pops accidentally starts a fire in his apartment during a Halloween party, he's evicted and Beverly invites him to move into the Goldbergs' home.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Emergency Contractor
programme.desc: When Max and Caroline get home from their road trip, Caroline discovers she likes the dessert bar renovations as much as she like Bobby, the contractor on the job. Also, Max rushes to Randy’s side when she hears he's in the hospital in New York City.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Insert Car Here
programme.desc: Jason loses control when he finds Kelly on a date with a new man in the car that he gave her as a gift. Tasha is forced to face her insecurities about her relationship, while Melanie tries to find alternate ways to connect without physical intimacy.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Pledging
programme.desc: Vanessa is concerned that Mandy's boyfriend, Kyle, is holding her back from enjoying college life and urges her to join her old sorority, causing Mandy to have to choose between Kyle and her social life.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Elephant Camp
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, Jack visits Elephant Camp - a home for orphaned elephants. He assists in radio collaring a female in preparation for her release into the wild. Then, Jack walks with an orphaned cheetah.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Braving Bocas
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago features a high concentration of bats. Jack ventures into a remote cave to get up close with bats and learn about the species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Loango: Africa's Last Eden
programme.desc: Jack and his family explore the untouched wilderness of Loango National Park in Gabon, which is often called Africa's Last Eden. They encounter forest elephants, forest buffalo, and injured sea turtle and a wild beach.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Italianate Inspiration
programme.desc: Norm and Tom patch in the holes in the old oak veneer floors. Kevin meets interior designer Christine Tuttle at an 1870 Italianate style home in Dedham, Massachusetts, to see how work she recently completed their echoes what we might do at our house.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Top Dogs
programme.desc: Students learn to care for exotic animals at a Teaching Zoo. A San Francisco dog rescue helps senior dogs find home. Plus, avalanche rescue dogs on patrol.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Ski Jump Slip N Slide
programme.desc: Alie shows us how you can now print your pancakes, a device that's pulling power from the rivers, the physics behind an extreme slip and slide, and windmills the size of a flea that could revolutionize electric power.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Going Solo: Bewitched in Bali
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Where There's Smoke, There's Ire
programme.desc: Mandy takes a new interest in vaping, and while disappointing to her parents, it also sparks memories of Vanessa's old smoking habits. Later on, Mike finds out that Vanessa has been secretly smoking and must find a way to gently confront her.

programme.desc: Boyd is turning 10 years old, and sticking with the Baxter family tradition, Mike wants nothing more than to give him a shotgun and take him hunting. Kristin is all for it, but Ryan has no interest in his son having a gun or harming animals.

programme.desc: After TV movie "The Day After" airs, Barry takes matters into his own hands by attempting to convince Murray to build an underground bunker. When he says no, Barry tries one last attempt at getting Murray to change his mind.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Silent Stars and Rebel Cars
programme.desc: Corey checks out a 1940 Buick said to have been owned by Fidel Castro. Will he jump at the chance to own a piece of the communist's sedan? Then, Rick is silenced when Charlie Chaplin's driver's licence cruises into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You Say You Wanna Revolution
programme.desc: The guys check out an Annual Register from 1776. Corey checks out a set of gambling tokens from the Nevada State Prison. Rick sentences Chumlee to a week of hard labour.

programme.title: Movie: The Object of My Affection
programme.desc: A young woman falls hopelessly in love with her best friend, who is also her gay roommate.

programme.title: Movie: It's Kind of a Funny Story
programme.desc: After checking himself into an adult psychiatric ward, a clinically depressed teenager gets a fresh start.

programme.title: Avenue 5: This Is Physically Hurting Me

programme.title: Curb Your Enthusiasm: Elizabeth, Margaret and Larry

programme.title: Movie: Benny and Joon
programme.desc: A misfit who shelters his mentally ill sister stumbles onto the perfect companion for her.

programme.desc: A police officer falls in love with the woman he is supposed to be investigating.

programme.title: Movie: I.Q.

programme.title: Movie: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: A man and a woman pretend to be Italian to win each other's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Arthur 2: On the Rocks
programme.desc: A billionaire loses his fortune and struggles to regain his dignity and his wealth.

programme.title: Movie: Picture Perfect
